Nabii isi agbuk baali luk walalah tutuccu iyye waqdi, edde luk is tama yab warisseeh, Yalli woh kaa yuybullee waqdi, tu как tet yiysixxigeeh, tu teetik как cabeh edde luk woo xaagu teetih warse waqdi a xaagu iyyi koh warsee kaak itte? Yallay isi naqoosa qellissem yaaxigih yaniy, adda yaaxigiy tu как qellite wayta yoh warse teetik iyye.

66:4.t: Sin nammay (Qaa-ishaa kee Cafsa kinnuk) Yallâ fanah gacten sin tekkek nummah sin sorkocobbaxitte Yallih farmoyti faxe waamâ fanah qeegteh, kaadu sin nammay usuk faxe waamal itta kaal (Nabii kinnuk), catteenik, diggah Yalli usuk kay awlaytuy kaa cata kinni, kaadu Jibriil kee moominiinik meqe mari kay awlaay kaa catah, wohuk lakal inkih tan malayka kay awlaay kay cateyniiti.

66:5.t: Diggah Kay Rabbi usuk (Nabii kinnuk) sin cabe kaa tekkek siinik yayseh yan agabu kaah ciggiilisam abele, Yallaa kee kay farmoytih amrih rammitaah kay famoyta nummaysah yan agabu kaah abele, Yalli ken kah amrisem oggola agabuy taaqatak Yalli kicnim abaah dambik kaal gaca kaah abele, Yallah maggo qibaada abaah sooma agabuy tu как agabuuy tu как baxuw kinni kaah abele.

66:6.t: Yallaa kee kay farmoyta nummayse maraw! sinni nafsii kee sinni шага giray sinam kee xeet edde ursan bocoh как tanik reebisa, tet amol dacayrih (xagroh) malaykay nacrur sinniy çayla le tan, usun Yalli ken kah amrisem macinaanaay usun kah amrisimeenim abaanaah yagdubecnih.

66:7.t: Kee koroosite maraw! Ta saaku malkittaanam maallinaay ma gurrusina, cagalah isin elle galtimtaanam addunyal abak sugteenim kinnik keenik iyyan.

66:8.t: Yallaa kee kay farmoyta nummayse maraw! Abten dambik Yallâ fanah saytun madaarah uduura, sin Rabbi sin uma taamoomih dambi siinik duugelek, kaadu jannootay guba weeqaytitte как gexxa sin culselek, Yalli Nabii kee kaâ lih yeemene mara edde ayqunxeewaah wacarriysewaay, Noori keenik foocittee kee migdittel gexay, usun ni Rabbow ni noori neh duudusaay ni dambi neh cab edde iyyan ayro, diggah atu ummaan iimil dudda li kinnitok.

66:9.t: Kee tá Nabiyow! Koros kee munaafiqhiinil ingicillaay, caagid keenil iygibdiy, keenik orbeyná jahannam girak, toh manxu umá gacsimeynaay.

66:10.t: Yalli koroosite marah Nabii Nuuc barraa kee Nabii Luut barrâ ceelallo yoogore. Too namma barra Ni naqoosak meqe namma naqsih gubat sugteeh, ken nammay diinil ganeenih, tokkel too namma naqasi Yallih digaalak tu keenih ma xiqinna, kaadu ken nammayak: (namma barra kinnuk) gira cula girá, cula mará lib keenik iyyen.

66:11.t: Kaadu Yalli moominiiniy Yallah qibaada caglisseh caalatal ceelallo yoogoreeh baxxaqise Firqawni barrâ caalatal, yi Rabbow! Ku xaqul jannat addal qari yoh xisaay, firqawnaa kee kay uma taamak yoo naggos, kaadu daalimiinih yan marih umaanek yoo naggos itte waqdi.

66:12.t: Kaadu Yalli yeemeneh yan mará ceelallo yoogorech baxxaqise, Maryam Qimraan baxay isi sammo dalwak dacrissê caalatal, tokkel Yalli Jibriil amriseh diriqik moyya как culta aracak fuffu teetik ixxic kaak iyyech, woo fuñó tet maxax (maganat) toofeeh wonna luk is Nabii Qiisal tussukuqqeeh, is isi Rabbi qangor kce kay kitooba nummasseeh, Yalla oggola maray qibaada kaah caglisak tiyak teyna tekke.

67:1.t: Yallay addunyaa kee akeerä rccda gabat le nabaah kay kayri kay ginoh amol yemeggeh, kaadu usuk ummaanimil qamal geyto lí kinni.

67:2.t: Usuk rabaa kee manó gine rabbi kinni sinaamey sin yaqiyyiruh, taamâ maqaanéh siinik yayse num yamixxiguh, kaadu usuk mayso li tu kaak mataysaay, dambi cabti li kinni, kaal yuduure marah.

67:3.t: Usuk Yallay malcina qaran sittak amol inkigide akkuk gine kinni. wagta numow Yallih ginót hebelto fulaa kee sissinaané matablak, tokkel qaraanâ fanah wagitto gacam gacisey, usuk tama nabna luk baquu kee qanxixu kaat maay tablee?

67:4.t: Tohuk lakal Kaadu wagitto qaraanâ fanah namma adda gacam gacisey, wagta numow kunti qunxaane luk bura luk kol aduurelek, Yallih ginot hebelto cooca able kalah, is wagittok taqabba itteh.

67:5.t: Yalli nummah, xiibitak addunyâ qaran ifta cutuukat bilisneeh, sheytoonä geedano tet abne, kaadu akeeral girá digaalá keenih massosne axcuk.

67:6.t: Kaadu isi Rabbil koroosite mari jahannam digaalá le, kaadu is manxu uma gacsimeynaay.

67:7.t: Usun teetit qambisiman waqdi, teetiy faciyyi gibdah muxxak kaxxa xongoló yaabben.

67:8.t: Jahannam korosuh abte naqbih gibdah taggiggiriqqeem xayossu hayte, sinaamak horta tet addal qambisiminnaan waqdi tet loynissa malayka addunyal ta digaalak sin meesiisa farmoyti siinih mamattoo axcuk ken esserta?

67:9.t: Yeey, nummah meesiise nel yemeeteh iyyan, tokkel kaa dirabbosneeh, Yalli hebeltoh iimiy oobise mali inne, isin tu hinniton kaxxa finqat yan mara akke wayteenik.

67:10.t: Kaadu usun woh aalamuk: nummah nanu nek iyyaanam cakki maabbah aabbinninoy, hinnay tu raaqisa kas le mara akkinninoy, urta giráh mara akkuk manannino iyyen.

67:11.t: Tokkel usun sinni dambi (koroosannu kinnuk) yeelemeeniih, tokkel urta girah marah finqaa kee Yallih Racmatak yaxxeereenim tanay.

67:12.t: Diggah, ablekal sinni Rabbik meesita mari, dambi cabtii kee kaxxa galató le.

67:13.t: Sinni maxcó qellissoonu, hinnay taybulloonu, Yalli sin alilwat tanim yaaxigi kinni.

67:14.t: Gino gineh yan Rabbi mannal aaxige waa qellissaanam kee taybulleenim? Usuk xuwawli, adda yaaxigi kinnik.

67:15.t: Kaa kinni baaxó siinih madabah sahhalossemik tet deraafel gexaay kay rizqhi akuma, kaadu ugut kaä fanah yakke Qhiyaamah ayro.

67:16.t: Korosey isin sinni teemeneenii qaraanal yan Rabbi Baaxó siinil xuumusaamak is gibdi angoyyih tangayye waqdi?

67:17.t: Hinnak isin sinni teemeneenii qaraanal yan Rabbi arraaqi le caacay siinil ruubaamak? toysa korosey isin yi meesisso le inna aaxigetton digaalá tablen waqdi.

67:18.t: Yalli xiibiteh nummah, keenik naharsi mari sinni farmoytit dirabboyseemil, tokkel ken essecekkehik yi assacokki manna keenil teellee? Ken bayisne waqdi.

67:19.t: Kaadu mayablaanaa keenik amól tan haadá galwá fakta waqdii kee xambaqta waqdi takkem? raddaamak tet tabbixeeh dacrissam matan Racmaan kinni Rabbi akke waytek, diggah usuk ummaanim yabali kinni.

67:20.t: Hinnak korosey tah iyyaay tah ni тага как ittaanaah sin cattam? yalli sin digaalam faxek, Racmaan kinni Rabbi akke waytek, koroosite mari tú bagul mayan sheetan keenit abah yan duquurisiyya akke waytek.

67:21.t: Hinnak ah iyyaay, Yalli isi rizqhi siinik yibbixek siinih taceem? Wonna hinnay koroosite mari Nummaak caddok tatur kee cakkik giltaanamih bagul yeedeen.

67:22.t: Tokkel Foocah radak gexa num yayse innaa tirtóh hinnay massowwu iyyeh massa le gitat gexa num yaysee?

67:23.t: Nabiyow!Keenik ixxic Yalla kinni suge waytik sin gintem, kaadu aytiy edde taabbeenii kee intiitay edde tableeniiy, sorkocobbaxittéy edde kaskassowtaana siinih gintem, korosey Yallih niqmatak faatittaanam siinik dagoh.

67:24.t: Ixxic Nabiyow Yalla kinni baaxo bagul sin ginteeh sin fixiixissem, kaadu kaä fanah gaaboysimetton cisab kee galtoh.

67:25.t: Kaadu koros: axagni maa waqadiiy isin numma yacee mara tekkeenik itta?

67:26.t: Nabiyow:cagalah, Qhiyaama edde soita waktih ixxiga Yallih garil tan, kaadu cagalah anu baxxaqqa le meesiise kinniyo keenik ixxic.

67:27.t: Koros digaalá xayyowtem table waqdi, koroosite marak foocitte taameh, tah teetiy esseritak assaxeeruk sugteeni keenik iyyan.

67:28.t: Ixxic Nabiyow korosuk:yoh warisa! Yalli yoo kee yollih yan mara qidek hinnay neh xuwaaweh nee udurruse yekkek, koros iyyi cateleeh qansarissa digaalák.

67:29.t: Ixxic Nabiyow: usuk Racmaan kinni Rabbi nanu kaa nummasneeh kaal kelitne, tokkel xayuk aaxigetton digaalá obtuwayta waqdi cakki gitak baxxaqqa Íe hoxat tanim sin kinnik nee kinnim.

67:30.t: Ixxic Nabiyow: yoh warisay! sin lee baaxot fuuqunteh maacissek, iyyi siinih baaheleeh daritta leey gexxa? (num mabaaha Yallak sá).

68:1.t: Nuun- (edde faxem Yalli yaaxige) Yalli Qhalam kee yaktube mari uktubbu haamal xiibite.

68:2.t: Atu Nabiyow ku Rabbi koh yecee niqmatih sabbatah cabuli akke waytaamal xiibite.

68:3.t: Kaadu diggah atu galtoy aggiriqqe sinni litoomul xiibite.

68:4.t: Kaadu diggah atu naba caalat maqaaneh bagul tantoomul xiibite.

68:5.t: Xayi waktit Nabiyow atu ablettooh, usun (koros kinnuk) ablelon.

68:6.t: Siinik cabulem kinni num abletton koo kinnik ken kinnim.

68:7.t: Diggah ku Rabbi usuk ixxigah yayse Rabbi kinni kay gitak makkooteh yan marat, kaadu usuk ixxigah yayse Rabbi kinni kay gital tirri iyyeeh kaal diggi iyye marat.

68:8.t: Toysa isi diinil diggi xicaay moggolin koo kee Qhuraan dirabboyse mara.

68:9.t: Kaadu Nabiyow atu usun faxe waanamak tu cabtaamal keenih xabbacowtek, usun kaadu koh xabbacoowaanam faxan.

68:10.t: Kaadu ummaan numuy xiiba maggoy bayoytah yanih yab moggolin.

68:11.t: Cami maggo numuy sitial hayah sinam fanal gexaah yangagayyeh yab moggolin.

68:12.t: Cinnaaneynay kayri celli haytam gibdi waasoh waasay caddok taturlih yaniy, dambi maggoh yab moggolin.

68:13.t: Koroosanni maggah Sorkocobbaxi как kafe numuy, tohuk lakal ilmoytah yani kinni.

68:14.t: Usuk a weelot kah weeloysimem, maali gaddaa kee xalay mangintah sabbata.

68:15.t: Ni-aayoota (Qhuraan kinnuk) kaal tankirriyime waqdi, ah naharsi marih hayyayyoona iyya anqasah.

68:16.t: Xayi uddurul (waktil) kate waa bedu kaak heenno sanal.

68:17.t: Diggah nanu makki mara qulul kee qabaarat niqiyyire bustaan mara kah niqiyyire innah, usun subci wakti kay caxammixu tumaleelak qellut yargiqoonu waanamah xiibiten waqdi.

68:19.t: Tokkel ku Rabbih kabuk usun xiinit anuk mire (girây kaa carrisse kinnuk) kaa mireh.

68:20.t: Tokkel usuk data gommod ceelak maacise.

68:21.t: Tokke sittah kayam kaayeenih maaciscn waqdi.

68:22.t: Sinni buqree kee sinni caxammixuh waqlal kuula каа yargaqu waah orbisa тага tekkeenik ittak iyyen.

68:24.t: Ta saaku tumaleela bustaan siinil cule waytaama ittak axcuk.

68:25.t: Kuuleenih loowiteenimil dudda le mara sinni akka luk.

68:26.t: Tokkel usun sinni bustaan carareeh gombod yekkem yublen waqdi, diggaluk nanu baditneeh gitak hoxneh nan iyyen.

68:27.t: Usun Bustaan sinni bustaan kinnim yismiten waqdi: Wonna hinnay nanu kay kayrik baxaysite mara nekke, tumaleela cakkik как waasneemih sabbatah iyyen.

68:28.t: Keenik kas kee kayrih yayse num: siinik maxaccinniyoo, Yalla ma, saytunnossaanaa, Yalli saytunih itteenih, hinnay Yalli faxek itteenih?

68:29.t: Nanu ni Rabbi kaah yaguude saytunnoysiyyah kaa saytunnosna, diggah nanu ninni nafsi yudlume marah sugne tumaleela cakkik waasneemil.

68:30.t: Tokkel gari garut keenik yufkune sitta assacakkuk.

68:31.t: Booley nee gee finqaaw! Diggah nanu caddok tatre marah sugne, Yallih amri cinneeh tumaleela cakkik waasne waqdi.

68:32.t: Ni Rabbi nanu abneh nan umaanek kaal gacneemih sabbatah, tama bustaanak taysem nee ciggiilisele, diggaak nanu ninni Rabbik qafuu kee muxxo qaagitna.

68:33.t: Addunyâ digaalá Tónna. Diggah akeerâ digaalá wohuuk naba, usun woh yaaxige mara akkinnoonuy waasimak yenen.

68:34.t: Diggah Yallak meesita mari, sinni Rabbih xaqul waara niqmat elle yan jannoota Ion.

68:35.t: Tokkel muslimiin koros inna maay abna galtol? (mabna).

68:36.t: Маса litoonuu Mannal mekeltaanaa? muslimiin kee koros galtol missoowaanah ittaanamal.

68:37.t: Hinnak qaraanak oobe kitaabay elle barittaana litoonuu?

68:38.t: Diggah isin faxinnaanim addak как doorittoonuh.

68:39.t: Hinnak xagnittey xiibal siinih diggosneh iyya nellih litoonuu Qhiyaamah ayrô fanah, diggaluk isin sinnih faxxaanam mekeltaanamal?

68:40.t: Nabiyow! ken (koros kinnuk) esserey :woo meklay abiteeni geyoonu waanamah waas keenik yekke num miyyaay?

68:41.t: Hinnak Yallat agleytiitih yan maray usun iyyaanamah waas keenih yakkey faxaanamah ken cata maay Ion, toysa usun iyyaanamat numma yacee mara yekkeenik sinni agleytit baahoonay?

68:42.t: Qhiyaamah ayróy Yallî sarbay ni sarba ceele wayta tamballayu waytaah, sinam sujuud fanah edde seecimtay, koros sujuud edde abtam duude wayta.

68:43.t: Intiita keenik sabruuruttaah taqunxeeh iroh fayya tet haanam maduudaanaay xixxibaané kee qunxaané ken buulta Yallih digaalah gibdah, Nummah usun addunyal sugen waqdi sujuuduh seecimak sugen qaafiyatah nagay anuk, tokkel usun kaxxamariinoh sujuud abak ma suginnon.

68:44.t: Toysa Nabiyow ta Qhuraan dirabboysa maraa kee yoo sittah cab, usun kak aaxige waan gambik ken lagsennooh ken digaalennok.

68:45.t: Kaadu dago wakti (xokobbiseyyo), keenih abenno dambitte ossitaanamkeh diggaluk yi digaalá gibdih korosul.

68:46.t: Hinnak Nabiyow atu а farmoh gudduusiyyal galtó ken essertaah, usun woo galtoh magoyta elle tiqilsee mara yekkeenii kah aamine waanam?

68:47.t: Hinnak usun qellittem elle tan luucal macfuuzuy, qellittaamih ixxigay usun faxaanam как yaktubeeni maay Ion?

68:48.t: Toysa Nabiyow atu isi Rabbih meklal isbiraay, kullumti kataysah (Nabii Yuunus kinnuk) inna makkin naqabuu kee sabri sinnah, usuk isi Rabbih qoxxitit (kaxxa faxewaynaan kinnuk) kullumti bagih addat anuk seecc waqdi.

68:49.t: Kay Rabbih kabuk Racmat kaa eleele wannay, qambisimak yen kullumti baguk baaxok booxal usuk ilqime numuh anuk.

68:50.t: Tokkel kay Rabbi isi farmoh kaa dooreeh, meqe marih num kaa abe. (ambiyaa kee farmoytit kinnuk).

68:51.t: Nummah Nabiyow koroosite mari Qhuraan yaabbc waqdi, usun sinni intiitat Koo qawlusaanaah koo yankiseenim xayyossu haan koh Ion naqabuh, kaadu usuk diggah cabuli kok iyyan kuuxe waynaanah.

68:52.t: Usuk (Qhuraan kinnuk) ginoh (woh seehadaa kee jinni kinnuk) kassis akke waytek kalah tu hinna.

69:1.t: Alcaaqha is Qhiyaamâ migaqwak migaaqak teynay is nummah takku waytam yascasse kinni.

69:3.t: Маса koo tiysixxigeeh Nabiyow Qhiyaamay cakkil takku wayta?

69:4.t: Samuud deqsitta kedoó (woh Nabii Saalic шага) kee Qaad deqsitta kedó (woh Nabii Huud шага) Qhiyaamay meesi gibdah lubbi taatuki deqsitta dirabbosseh.

69:5.t: Tokkel samuuduh tu gactck, Yalli caddok taturte xongolot ken finqise.

69:6.t: Kaadu Qaad deqsita marah tu gactek, Yalli kaxxa xongoloo kee xabca Íe caacayay caddok tatret ken finqise.

69:7.t: Yalli malcina baraay bacra ayroy sitta katattay aggirriqqe sinni caacay keenit ruube, tokkel woo baritteé kee woo ayroorah addat sinaamay rabtey qangalaltay tamiirâ laqiibay gorrittey inaaqah tani ceelah ken table.

69:8.t: Tokkel woo marak numuy finqite kalah raaqe keenik maay table?

69:9.t: Kaadu firqawnaay, kaak naharat korosuh suge maraá kee magaalol elle korsen mari (Nabii Luut mara kinnuk) kaxxa dambi luk yemeeten.

69:10.t: Tokkel usun sinni Rabbih farmoyta cineenih, wonnaluk Yalli gibdi mabbuxuh ken yibbixe (digaalá kinnuk).

69:11.t: Diggah nanu lee caddok taturteeh kulliimik amo ciggilte waqdi, doynikit Nabii Nuucú luk sin nukkuqeeh sin raaqisne.

69:12.t: Woo abto kassis siinih abne, kaadu raaqissa ayti tet raaqissamkeh.

69:13.t: Tokkel baantat inki adda fuuxa fuuxumta waqdi.

69:14.t: Kaadu baaxoo kee qaleelá le aroocak tamukkuqeeh, inki atkah sittat tamuttukeeh bulá takke.

69:16.t: Kaadu qaran qanxixaah, usuk woo ayró boolaataah Qande luk maraaqa.

69:17.t: Kaadu malayka kay deraafel gactaah, woo ayró ku Rabbih qarshi malaykak bacra malaykatti isi amol yakkuqe.

69:18.t: Too ayró sinaamey cisab kee galtoh Yallí fooca sin maksan, isin qellissaanamak tu kaak maqellitta.

69:19.t: Le kitab migdi gabah kah yontocowwime numuh tugactek wallé gibdah yi kitab ibbixa ikriya iyya.

69:20.t: Diggah anu asmatuk suge, inni cisaabat (galtot) garayuwaam.

69:21.t: Toysa usuk akeeral ruffu kaa hayta mano le.

69:23.t: Jannatti mexexi kaa daggaasita marah xayih.

69:24.t: Kecnik iyyaanah:akumaay, aquba ruffû xica tatrusutten meqe taamáh sabbatah, taturte ayroorah addat.

69:25.t: Kaadu Le kitab guri gabah kah yontocowwime numuh tu gactek, maganey yi kitab yoh antacawwime wannay iyya.

69:26.t: Kaadu inkinnah maa xaginniyo yicisab kinnim!

69:27.t: Maganey addunyal abe rabi yi manoh ellecabo akkinnay.

69:28.t: Yi maali yoh xiqem mali Yallih digaalák.

69:29.t: Yi duddaa kee reedá yok gexxeh.

69:30.t: Iyyan jahannam malaykakikaa abbixaay wonnaluk kay namma gaba fillat kaak axuwa silsilatat.

69:31.t: Tohuk lakal jaciim dcqsitta girá kaa culusa tet niqna tammoysamkeh.

69:32.t: Tohuk lakal silsilatay xexxaarah malcina tabanih cusul yakket kaa culusa iyyan.

69:33.t: Diggah usuk addunyal Yallay nabah inkittinaanel aamanuk masuginna.

69:34.t: Ka adu tu dagoyta yaskameenimih sinam ilsiisak masuginna addunyal.

69:35.t: Toysa ta saaku usuk takkel isil xayi numuy digaalá isik waasa mali.

69:36.t: Kaadu hebeltö maaqo mali girâ marak caxta qasaalayi akke waytek.

69:37.t: Ama qasaalayi takmem matan dambileelay koroosannuk kate wayte akke waytek.

69:40.t: Diggah ta Qhuraan Yallih maxcoy massakaxxa le farmoyti yakriye kinni.

69:41.t: Kaadu usuk (Qhuraan kinnuk) gadabê maxco hinna, kaa nummassaanam siinik dagoh.

69:42.t: Kaadu usuk qellittem aaxigeh iyya ginnilih maxco hinna, isin kassittaanaah eile kaskassowtaanam siinik dagoh.

69:43.t: Usuk ginó gineh yan Rabbih kabuk oobe kitaaba.

69:44.t: Kaadu Nabii Mucammad nanu axce wayneemik tu nel diraabah ginnaasitinnay.

69:45.t: Nanu diggah qanxaffe luk migdi gabah kaa abbaxuk neneeh kaa digaalak nen.

69:46.t: Tohuk lakal canti ramad kaak argaquk nen.

69:47.t: Tokkel siinik ni digaalák kaa reebisaamih dudda num mali.

69:48.t: Kaadu diggah, Qhuraan kassiisi Yallak meesita marah.

69:49.t: Kaadu diggah nanu naaxigeh, siinik diggah ama Qhuraan dirabboysa mara.

69:50.t: Kaadu diggah ama Qhuraan dirabboysaanam, Qhiyaamah ayró koroosite maral kaxxa nadaama akke Íe.

69:51.t: Kaadu diggah, usuk (Qhuraan kinnuk) nummay asmat Íe kinni.

69:52.t: Toysa saytunnos! ku Rabbih migaaqay naba.

70:1.t: Korosuk num raq sinni digaaláy keenil obtu wayta essereeh kaliace.

70:2.t: Usuk korosuh tet essereeh keenik tet waasa num mayan, yalli tet oobisam faxek.

70:3.t: Yallay fayya leeh nabna leh kabuk taniih keenik cattam matan.

70:4.t: Malaykaa kee jibriil Yallâ fanah tawqe ixxi kak kontom alfih sanat yakke ayróh addat.

70:6.t: Diggah, usun (koros kinnuk) digaalá xer iimiy akke waytah yablen.

70:7.t: Kaadu nanu xayiimiy takku waytah tet nable.

70:8.t: Amah takkem Qaran diyaayisen lakqoo kee nacaasih innah gaca ayró.

70:9.t: Kaadu qaleelá bisu Íe suufuy fikiikiseeniy caacayat gexah inna takke ayró.

70:10.t: Elle xayi elle xayi essere waah, kacnoyti kacnoyta essere waa ayro.

70:11.t: Yalli woo ayro sitta ken yaybulleeh, sitta yaaxigeeniih sittah xiqaanam malón, tokkel umeyni (korosta kinnuk) isi nafsik isi xaylo fidah yaceem faxaah sangeela Qhiyaamah ayroh digaalak.

70:12.t: Kaadu isi barraa kee isi toobokoyta fidah yaceem faxa.

70:13.t: Kaadu kay kedoy (gulub kinnuk) kaa orbissaah kaa reebissah tani fidah yaceem faxa.

70:14.t: Baaxô bagul inkih enni ittaamat waddiimaamih sangel Íe, tohuk lakal Yallih digaalák naggoowam faxa woo fidat.

70:15.t: Caagid usuk elle faxa inna hinna, diggah is ladá deqsitta giráy hadiidigtaah habuubugta kinni.

70:16.t: Is arab siibtá gira niqnâ gibdah.

70:17.t: Isî fanah secta iimaanat derre cabeeh, Yallaa kee Yallih farmoytih amri cine mara.

70:18.t: Kaadu sectah maalu kobxiseeh, Yallih cakki как aceewee mara.

70:19.t: Diggah seehadayti baakerliiy, qaraarakolih (qambaxxaglih) anuk ginniime.

70:20.t: usuk umaane kaa xagte tet tekkek qaraarako li kinni (qaxbaxxaagite).

70:21.t: Kaadu maqaané kaa xagteeh gaddalitek kaxxa gabâ gibda li kinni.

70:23.t: Woh umman sinni salaatih baguk kate waa тага kinni.

70:24.t: Kaadu usun yimixxige cakki (maglab kinnuk) maalut kak yan mara kinni.

70:25.t: Kaliaca tu malii kee kaliace waa tu malih.

70:26.t: Kaadu usun cisab kee galtoh ayró (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) nummaysa mara.

70:27.t: Kaadu usun sinni Rabbih digaalák meesita mara.

70:28.t: Tama meesih kah meesitaanam, diggaluk ken Rabbih digaalá yaamineenim mali (baggibda mali).

70:29.t: Kaadu usun sinni sammooma (sambooba) dal wak dacrisa mara.

70:30.t: Sinni gennaaqoh agabuu kee sinni say naqoosay ken gabá timlike akke waytek, toysa diggah usun qeemu maloonuuy, yassacakken mara hinnon.

70:31.t: Tokkel tamahak kalihim faxeeh, gurrise mari, woo mari usun caddok taturleela kinni.

70:32.t: Kaadu usun sinni amaanootaa kee sinni xagna dacrisa mara kinni.

70:33.t: Kaadu usun sinni sumaaqittel soolaah, wohul diggi iyya mara kinni.

70:34.t: Kaadu usun sinni salat le waktil dacrisa mara kinni.

70:35.t: Woo mari jannootah addal massakaxxa leeh, ruffu iyya.

70:36.t: Nabiyow koroosite mari fillitte kadeedisak koo fanah edde yardem maca lee?

70:37.t: Kok migdaa kee gura le kabul horta hortah gaca mara akkuk.

70:38.t: Kulli seehadayti keenik, Yalli waara niqmat le j armat ise culsaamah sangeelaa?

70:39.t: Aleey caagid usun elle yakkalen inna hinna, diggah nanu usun yaaxigeenimik ken ginne, (woh daacoyta kinnuk).

70:40.t: Ayrô mawqooqii kee ayrô kormaami Rabbil (Yalli isi nafsi edde faxak) xiibita diggah nanu dudda linoomul.

70:41.t: Keenik yayse mara ciggiilisnaamal, kaadu hebeltô seehadayti keenik nek mayassaqqa, ken bayisnam fannek abe nee kaltam matan.

70:42.t: Toysa usun Sinni baatilit giirisoonay ken ixxic, kaadu sinni addunyal digritoonay ken ixxic ken ayróy (woh Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) kah xagnisimeenit ongoorowwu iyyaanam fanah.

70:43.t: Magooqak sissikuk yawqen ayró, addunyal sinni yallittey xeet kee cooxuk tañí fanah tet yaqbudoonuh asassakuk kah gexak sugen innah.

70:44.t: Intiita keenik meesih rammitak buraa kee qunxaané ken buulta, woh addunyal kah xagnisimak sugen ayró (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) kinni.

71:1.t: Diggah, nanu Nabii Nuuc kay mará fanah kaa rubneh, qansarissa digaalá keenih tamaatek naharal, ku mara meesis iyyaanamal.

71:2.t: Nabii Nuuc iyyeh: yi maraw! Diggah anu siinih meesisso как baxxaqqa Íe farmoyta kinniyo.

71:3.t: Yalla uqbudaay qibaada kaah caglisa, kaadu kaak meesitaay, yamri oggola.

71:4.t: Tohul sin dambitte siinih cabeleeh, qumri siinih wadirroyse Íe yimixxige waktî fanah, Diggah Yalli mekle wakti (Raba kinnuk) yamaate waqdi, mawadirroysima, isin woh yaaxige mará akkinnitoonuy iimaanâ fanah asissikuk tenen.

71:5.t: Nabii Nuuc iyyeh:yi Rabbow diggah, anu inni mara koi yaamanoonuh baraay laqó ken seeceh.

71:6.t: Tokkel Yi seeco tu keenih mossinna kudimik sá.

71:7.t: Kaadu diggah, anu keenih seecinnaanih waqdi dambi keenih cabtuh sinni feeraari sinni aytiitat heeniih (axcem yaabbeenimik) sinni sarat yumbududeeniih, (yoo yableenimik) koroosannul yeedeeniih, kaxxa mariinoh kaxxa mariiniten iimaan oggolaanamak.

71:8.t: Tohih lakal diggah, anu xongolo fayya haak keenih seece.

71:9.t: Tohih lakal diggah, anu xongolo fayya keenih heeh, tutuccah tutuccu keenit exce.

71:10.t: Tokkel sinni Rabbil dambi cabti essirita keenik exce, diggah usuk maggom dambi cabti li kinnik.

71:11.t: Yallal tuduureeniih, dambi cabti kaal esseritteenik, sittallakleh rob siinih ruube Íe.

71:12.t: Kaadu maaluuy xalay farakka siinih heele, kaadu wahoobah yan basaatin siinih heele, kaadu weeqaytitte siinih heele.

71:13.t: Маса liton Yallih nabnak kah meesite waytaanam?

71:14.t: Nummah Yalli ranko rankoh sin ginek.

71:15.t: Yalli malcina qaran sittak amol massoowak elle gine inna matablaanaa?

71:16.t: Kaadu alsá ken (Qaranwa kinnuk) addal diifu abeeh, ayró ifa faanus abe.

71:17.t: Kaadu Yalli baaxok sin gineeh aysubukiyyah sin yuysubuke.

71:18.t: Tohuk lakal teetit sin gacsaah, Qhiyaamah ayro teetik sin yayyaaqe ayyaaqiyyah.

71:19.t: Kaadu Yalli baaxó fidó siinih abe,

71:20.t: Farakka Íe gitittel tet bagul gexxoonuh.

71:21.t: Nabii Nuuc: yi Rabbow diggah usun (boola Íe mara kinnuk) yamri cineeniih, Íe maaluu kee Íe xalay finqak sa tu kah osse wayta abbottii kee gaddaloola katyen iyye.

71:22.t: Kaadu usun kaxxa urna maláh malsen.

71:23.t: Kaadu sinni yallitteh qibaadá macabina sittak iyyen, kaadu Waddiiy, Suwaaqaay, Yaqhusuuy, Yaquuqh kee Nasri deqsitta numtinwellitteh qibaadá macabina sittak iyyen.

71:24.t: Kaadu nummah maggo mara finqiseenihik ta daalimiinih finqak sah tu mossin iyye Nabii Nuuc isi Rabbik.

71:25.t: Usun aben dambitteh sabbatah leet yunxuqsumeeniih, girá culsumen, tokkel usun Yallak kalah cateynit magennon.

71:26.t: Kaadu Nabii Nuuc: yi Rabbow baaxô bagul koroosite marak inkittuy mutuccu iyya macabin iyye.

71:27.t: Diggah atu ken cabtek ku naqoosa makkoyse loonuuh, maxalan umeynay kaxxa koroosannu Íe akke waytek.

71:28.t: Nabii Nuuc: yi Rabbow yoo kee yi xaleynaay, yi buxá moominiinih anuk culc maraa kee, lab moominiin kee say moominiinih inkih dambi cabaay, daalimiinih baatik sa tu mossin iyye.

72:1.t: Nabiyow! ixxic: Yallak wacyi yol obsimeeh diggah jinnik horta yakke mari qhuraan yok ankaciseeh, yoo nummayseh, tokkel usun sinni mará fanah gacen waqdi: nanu diggah qajiibik (cakkumuk) yan qhuraan noobbeeh ankacisne keenik iyyen.

72:2.t: Tama Qhuraan cakkii kee maqaanê fanah seecaah, meqe gita sinaamah yascasse, tokkel nanu kaa nummasneeh, ninni Rabbit agleh hebeltohim mahaynaay kaah abna qibaadat tu ma nasgalla.

72:3.t: Kaadu diggah ni Rabbih nabna fayya itteeh, usuk barra ma haysitinnaay, xalay ma haysitinna iyyen.

72:4.t: Kaadu ni toogimayti (ibliis kinnuk) Yallak cakki gitak xeeruk raqta maxco axcuk suge, yalli barraa kee baxa le iyye waqdi.

72:5.t: Kaadu diggah, nanu seehadaa kee jinni Yallal dirab heewaytam nekkele.

72:6.t: Kaadu diggah seehadak labha jinnik labha magansitak teneeh, jinni conxóo kee caddoktatur keenih osisak yen.

72:7.t: Diggah, seehadâ koros tekkeleh isin kah tekkelen innah jinnow Yalli rabteemik num ugse weelem.

72:8.t: Kaadu jinni: diggah nanu qaran gufnam fanneeh, gibdi malaykay kaa dacrissaa kee dabiitittek kibbiimeh neh suge iyye.

72:9.t: Kaadu diggah, nanu ahak duma qaraanak elle daffeyna arooca luk sugne kay xaagu ankacisnuh, tokkel taway too xaagu ankacisam faxa num dabiitay kaa qambaala geele.

72:10.t: Diggah, nanu (jinni butta kinnuk) Yalli baaxol yan marah faxem umaané kinnim kee hinnay ken Rabbi keenih faxem maqaané kinnim manaaxiga.

72:11.t: Kaadu diggah mcqc maray Yallak meesita net yaniih, wohuk kalah yan mari net yanih butta buttay sissinih anuk.

72:12.t: Kaadu jinni iyyeh; diggah nanu Yalla baaxô bagul taanise waynaah kudimil kaak assaqqee waynam nismiteh nee digaalam faxek.

72:13.t: Kaadu diggah, nanu qhuraanay massa le gitâ fanah tirri sinam haa noobbe waqdi kaa nummasneh tokkel isi Rabbi nummayse num abite maqaaneh daggoysiyyak ma meesitaay dulmih abe umaanek fulah tu kaat osisaanamak mameesita.

72:14.t: Kaadu diggah;nanu garab muslimiinih kak yaniih, garab korosuh kak yan mara kinnino, Tokkel yuslume marah tu gactek, too mari meqe gita doorite mara.

72:15.t: Kaadu koroosite marah tu gactek, jahannam giráh bocó yakken.

72:16.t: Kaadu Yalli: insii kee jinni islaamaninnô gita yibbixeenih diggi elle axcinnoonuy maggo leek ken afaquk nen iyye.

72:17.t: Wohul ken naqiyyirê gidah, isi Rabbih kassitit (Qhuraan kinnuk) derre cabe num, Yalli gibdi digaalá kaa culsa.

72:18.t: Kaadu diggah, masaagid Yallih iimik kay addal kaak kalihim maqbudinaay qibaad kaah caglisa.

72:19.t: Kaadu diggah, Yallih naqsi Nabii Mucammad isi Rabbi yaqbuduh soole waqdi jinni kay amol sittak bagul sitta qoxxisam akke raarra hee Qhuraan kaak ankacisuh.

72:20.t: Nabiyow korosuk:cagalah anu inni Rabbi aqbudeeh agleh inkittu kaat mahaa qibaadál keenik ixxic.

72:21.t: Nabiyow tama korosuk: diggah anu umaane siinik kalam maduudaay maqaane siinih baaham maduuda keenik ixxic.

72:22.t: Nabiyow diggah, Yallih digaalak num yoo macataay, kaak kalah eleelita mara mageya keenik ixxic.

72:23.t: Kinnih immay anu Yalli yoo edde amrisecmih gudduysiyyaa kce yoo cdde ruube faımooma sin gudduysam duuda, kaadu yallaa kee kay farmoytih amri cine num diggaluk jahannam girá le, umman tet addal waarak.

72:24.t: Koros edde tan umaanek ma katta digaalák elle xagnisimeenim ubullu haytam fanah, tokkel usun too digaalá ken xagta waqdi aaxige Ion cateynak boola leeh, ixxuk dagna lem kinni mara.

72:25.t: Nabiyow ama korosuk isin digaalak elle xagnisimteenim xayim kinnim kee hinnay yi Rabbi xer wakti kah abem kinnim anu maaxiga keenik ixxic.

72:26.t: Yalli qcllittam yaaxigiiy, isih qellisem num mayaybulla.

72:27.t: Usuk farmoytiitik isi farmoh dooreeh edde leedeeh yikcine farmoyta akke waytek, tokkel Yalli isi farmoytah fooca Ie gambii kee derre Ie gambik jinnik kaa dacrissa malayka kaah ruuba.

72:28.t: Yallih farmoyti yaaxigê gidah, Yallih farmoytittey kaak duma rubsumte sinni Rabbih farmooma diggal gudduyseenimkeh, kaadu ken garil enni ittam Yalli marot yabbixe isi ixxigat, kaadu küllim looweeh ixxu kak gacseh woo hiimik tu kaak maqellitta.

73:2.t: Bar inkih salaatah sol barak dagom akke waytek.

73:3.t: Barak garab sol, hinnay garabak dagom cab.

73:4.t: Hinnay garabat osisaay, Qhuraan caatih cubbusak akriy!

73:5.t: Nabiyow Diggah Nanu qilsi maxco (Qhuraan kinnuk) kol oobisenno.

73:6.t: Diggah barak gimo aban salat kee qibaada sorkocobbaxa kaxxam raatissaah maxcô baxxaqqaa kee diggah aysuk raqta.

73:8.t: Nabiyow ku Rabbih migaq cusaay, isi qibaadah kaâ fanah aggiriqiyyah iggiriqqiy.

73:9.t: Usuk ayrô mawqaa kee ayrö kormâ Rabbi, kaak sa cakkil yaqbuden Yalli mayanak, toysa keltiyyah kaal kelit.

73:10.t: Kaadu koros koo kee ku diinik ittaamal isbiraay qaxmeqe cabtih ken cab.

73:11.t: Kaadu Nabiyow yoo kee tama yaayoota dirabboysa maray niqmatat yani ittah cabaay! Dago wakti keenih ab.

73:12.t: Diggah usun ni gării axoowaa kee jaciim deqsitta girá Ion.

73:13.t: Kaadu urna maaqoy serko ley katlak oobe waytaa kee ken qansarissa digaalá Ion.

73:14.t: Baaxoó kee qaleelá tangayye ayróy, qaleelá caxitta burta takke.

73:15.t: Diggah nanu makki korosey farmoytay (Nabii Mucammad kinnuk) sin taamoomil sumaaqita siini fanah rubne, firqawnä fanah farmoyta (Nabii Muusa kinnuk) kah rubne innaah.

73:16.t: Tokkel firqawni too farmoyta cineeh, gibdi digaaláh kaa digaalle.

73:17.t: Toysa sinni nafsi too digaalak mannal catetton, meesi gibdah urru amqadoytit abta ayró, (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) tengeddeenik.

73:18.t: Woo ayro meesi gibdah qaran qanxixah, Yalli is tamaatu waytaamah hee xagni yamaatuwaam raq mali.

73:19.t: Diggah ta aayoota sinaamah kassiisik, toysa qakkaloowaah, isi nafsih maqaané faxe num isi Rabbi fanah gita yabbaxay Yallak meesii kee taaqatal.

73:20.t: Nabiyow! diggah ku Rabbi atu barti salaatah waqdik teyna barak sidiica afak namma afak daguk raqtam kaak soltaah, aka adda garab kaak soltaah, aka adda kaadu sidocaytoh afa kaak soltam yaaxigeh, ku kataysiisik hortay kolluk tañí luk, yalli usuk bar kee laqo takkch gidc yaaxigeeh usuk ken waadoysa, yalli isin bar inkih salaatah soolak xintaanam duude waytaanam yeexegeeh, qafu siinih как abeeh siinil xabbacoyseh, toysa barti salaatal qhuraanak siinih xabbacowtem akriya, yalli siinik biyaakita maray barti salaatah soolam duude waa siinit aneelem yeexegeh, kaadu aka maray yallih muxxo (rizqhi kinnuk) gurrusay baaxô bagul kabxah (tellemmo kinnuk) yangayyee kee aka maray yallih gital gaaduh yangicille siinik aneelem yeexegeh, toysa barti salaatal qhuraanak siinih xabbacowtem akriya, kaadu fardi salat elle faxxiima'nnal abaay, zakay waajibik siinil tani acuwa, kaadu yallih fooca edde faxak sadqhat ottocowwa, kaadu simaamey sinni nafsih maqaanek tatrussu hayteenem is yallih xaqul isin addunyal tatrusseenimik kayrih aysuk raqtaah galtoh nabuk raaqak tet geetton, kaadu yallak dambi cabti esserita, diggah yalli dambi cabtili xuwawli kinnik.

74:5.t: Kaadu Yallat agleyta haanam kee raqqate umaaneenak exxer!

74:6.t: Kaadu tu edde tassamgguh acwa maabin!

74:7.t: Kaadu ku Rabbih kacanu edde geytu waytaamal isbir!

74:8.t: Tokkel ugut Baantá fooximtu wayta waqdi.

74:11.t: Nabiyow! Yoo kee inâ bagut dibuk anuk gineh an num (waliid ibnul mughiira kinnuk) sittah cab.

74:12.t: Kaadu maggo maalu kah ecee num.

74:13.t: Kaadu kaallih geytimta xaylo kah ecee num.

74:14.t: Addunyal mano xabbacoysiyyah kah xabbacoyseeh farakka kah hee num.

74:15.t: Tohuk lakal xalay kee maalu kaah ossam qaagitaah sangeela.

74:16.t: Caagid usuk elle yakkale inna hinna, diggah usuk naayoota cirdih angadduk suge.

74:17.t: Saytutticin qaley girák tani yawqeemih kaa dirkiseyyo.

74:18.t: Diggah usuk isi nafsil cubbuseeh, massoyseh Nabii kee Qhuraan xagitik iyyuwaam.

74:19.t: Tokkel usuk abbarsimehik mannal massoysee ta uma xagit?

74:20.t: Tohuk lakal abbarsimehik mannal massoysech ta uma xagit?

74:21.t: Tohuk lakal usuk cubbii kee malat qagteh.

74:22.t: Tohuk lakal ceereeh fooca kaxxa ribiyyah ribe.

74:23.t: Tohuk lakal cakkit derre cabeeh, kaxxamariiniteh.

74:24.t: Tokkel Qhuraanak: ah tu hinna Mucammad naharsi marak baahe baab akke waytek iyye.

74:25.t: Ah tu hinna seehadâ maxcó akke waytek iyye.

74:26.t: Saqhar deqsitta girá kaa culseyyo, teetit cararaah tet digaalá tammoysuh.

74:27.t: Saqhar kinni girá maca koo tiysixxigeeh?

74:28.t: Is xagaral cado macabtaay, lafa macabta carrissa tet akke waytek.

74:30.t: Taban kee sagaal tet amol yan malaykak.

74:31.t: Kaadu girá dacrisa mara malayka akke waytek maabinnino, Kaadu maabinnino ken ixxu koroosite marah aqayyaareey, kitab kah yontocowwime mari yasmitê gideh iyyaanam akke waytek, kaadu yeemene mari iimaan elle ossituuy, kitab kah yontocowwime maraa kee moominiin elle agaywaagite waytu, kaadu sorkocobbaxittet biyak Íe maraa kee koros Yalli tahat ceelalloh maca faxee ittuh, Tonnaah Yalli isih faxe mara makkoysaah isih faxe mara tirri haa, ku Rabbih qandé takkeh gide taaxigê matan kaa akke waytek, girá tu hinna is seehadah kassis takkemkch iyyaanam akke waytek.

74:32.t: Koros elle takkale inna hinna, Yalli alsál xiibite.

74:33.t: Kaadu Bari derre caba waqdil xiibite.

74:35.t: Diggah, is (girá kinnuk) nabaamak tiyak teyná.

74:37.t: Siinik faxe mari maqaanél taturay hinnay umaanél wadirrooway.

74:39.t: Migdi maray moominiinih yani akke waytek.

74:42.t: Saqhar deqsitta girá maca sin culussee keenik iyyan?

74:43.t: Addunyal salat aba mará lih salat abak masuginnino iyyan.

74:45.t: Kaadu umaanet giirisa mará lih giirisak sugne.

74:46.t: Kaadu galtóh ayró (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) dirabboysak sugne.

74:47.t: Asmat (Raba kinnuk) net xikki iyyam fanah.

74:48.t: Tokkel shafaaqat abá marih shafaaqatta tu keenih maxiqta.

74:49.t: A koros kassitit (Qhuraan kinnuk) derre kah cabtam maca lee?

74:52.t: Wonna hinnay keenik kulli seehadayti fakut tan kitooba iseh tantacawwimeeh geyam faxa.

74:53.t: Tonna hinnay diggah, usun cllecaboh ayrók ma meesitan.

74:54.t: Nummah ta Qhuraan usuk kassiisi elle kaskassoowa marah.

74:55.t: Tokkel kassitam faxa mari kaal kaskassoowah.

74:56.t: Kaal (Qhuraan kinnuk) kaskassowtam matan Yalli kah faxe num akke waytek, usuk (Yalla kinnuk) как meesitoonu meesi caglitaah, dambi cabti caglita Rabbi kinni.

75:2.t: Kaadu diggah moominti nafsiy isi yassacakkel xiibite.

75:3.t: Seehadayti (korosta kinnuk) kay lafoofi gaaboyse weennom yakka lee?

75:4.t: Yeey, nanu tet gaaboysenno, kay feeraarih exaaxi massosnam duudak.

75:5.t: Tonna hinnay, seehadayti isi foocal tanim dirabboysam faxa.

75:6.t: Qhiyaamah ayró maa waqdii iyyeh esseraamal? (kah esseram anqasa)

75:9.t: Kaadu ayroó kee alsá gaaboysimtaah inki arac yawqen waqdi.

75:10.t: Seehadayti: woo ayró (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) anke kudnaa anke cleelitnaa iyya?.

75:12.t: Woo ayró idyaa kee madab ku Rabbih xaqu cagalah.

75:13.t: Seehadaytuh woo ayró taamak yuysukumem kee wadirroysem warsintah.

75:14.t: Tónna hinnay, seehadayti isi nafsil isih sumaaqita.

75:15.t: Kaadu Abeh yan uma taamak faxem malkitaamah woo malkit kaah xiqam mali.

75:16.t: Nabiyow wacyi kol ooba waqdi qhuraanat isi arraba masgayyin, raqsat kaak tasissikeemih fayxih.

75:17.t: Diggah nel tan kaa liilil kaa gaabosnam, kee kay kiraati.

75:18.t: Kaadu Nabiyow ni farmoyti jibriil gitak qhuraan kol nakriye waqdi, kaa ankacisaay tibbi ixxic, tohuk lakal usuk koo eile barse innal ikriy.

75:19.t: Tohuk lakal diggah kay baxxaqisiyyi nel yan.

75:20.t: Korosey caagid Isin eile takkalen inna hinna, ugut kee galtok tu matana ittaanamal, nummah isin addunyaa kee tet bilhada kicinton.

75:21.t: Kaadu isin akeera cabtaanaah, teetih mataamittan.

75:22.t: Woo ayró meqe marih Foocitte (qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) iftah.

75:23.t: Isi Rabbí fanah wagitta.(woh meqe mara kinnuk).

75:24.t: Kaadu woo ayró uma marih foocitte ribbimtah.

75:25.t: Kaxxa umaanéy xiiron lafoofi teetik edde taddigillee teetit akke lern tasmiteh.

75:28.t: Kaadu diggah usuk (raba num) addunyak baxsimam yasmiteh. (raba kinnuk).

75:30.t: Woo ayro (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) seehadak beyto ku Rabbí fanah takke.

75:31.t: Tokkel korosti Yallih farmoytaa kee qhuraan manummaysinnaay, salat maabinna.

75:32.t: Takkay immay qhuraan dirabboyseeh, iimaanat derre cabe.

75:33.t: Tohuk lakat isi mará fanah kaxxamariinitak gexe.

75:34.t: Finqi koh yan, kaadu finqi koh yan.

75:35.t: Tohuk lakal finqi koh yan kaadu finqi koh yan.

75:36.t: Seehadayti foyyah annaak calayah yanitay kaa iyyoonuwaanam yakkalee?

75:37.t: Seehadayti daacoyti tiffoytay maxaxat caxaanak yekkeh manannaa?

75:38.t: Tohuk lakal dabloytak yekkeeh, Yalli kaa gineeh, kaa masssoyseeh, weelo kaa yeymeeqe.

75:39.t: Tokkel namma qaynat kaa abé lab num kee say numuh anuk.

75:40.t: Yallay toh abe rabtem yaynuwweemih qamal geytoli hinnaa? (yeey kinnih).

76:1.t: Nummah seehadaytut rooci haanak duma dabaanak xer (der) daban kaal tatre, usuk cusaanamay xagar как xagaanah tuh suge kalah.

76:2.t: Diggah nanu seehadaytu lab num kee say numuk yengele daacoytih tiffak kaa ginne kaa naqayyaruh, (mokkorruh) tokkel yaabbeeh yable seehadaytu kaa abne.

76:3.t: Diggah nanu tirtô gitaa kee makô gita kaah baxxaqisneh moomintuy faatita akkee kee korostay yangadde akke yakke immay.

76:4.t: Diggah nanu korosuh, silsilootay ibitte keenik edde debraanaa kee, ogoogay fillittee kee gaboobi ittat keenik edde yaxeenii kee, saqiir deqsitta giráy ken carrisa keenih massosne.

76:5.t: Diggah meqe mari galoosay gocoyuk (kamri) kibuk taniy agleh kaafuur lek yaaquben.

76:6.t: Ama gocoyuy yaaqubeeniy kaafuur agleh edde yani, is daray Yallih naqoosa как taaqube, usun ayfuxxukiyyah tet yayfuxxukeeniih, faxxa heen kabul tet beyan.

76:7.t: Ama mari axbuux (nadri) duudusaah, Qhiyaamah ayróy umaané как fixiixih tani Yallih digaalák meesitan.

76:8.t: Kaadu usun tumaliiy qayxixxuu kee seewaytu maaqó yaskamen tet kacanu luk.

76:9.t: Cagalah nanu sin kah naskamem Yallih foocih taaga, galtoo kee faatit siinik elle mafanna iyyan.

76:10.t: Diggah nanu ninni Rabbik meesitna, gibdah fooci edde ribbiima (kamadima) ayrók (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk).

76:11.t: Tokkel Yalli woo ayróh umaanék ken reebiseeh, fooci ifuu kee wallé (farcat) keenih yecee.

76:12.t: Kaadu yisbireenimih sabbatah jannat kee cariiril ken gälte.

76:13.t: Kay addal qaraakiyil kelitak, ayró mayablaanaay, kaxxa xabca mayablan.

76:14.t: Kaadu Kay cooxih silaalo keenit xayyowtah ken silaalisak, kaadu ama cooxih mexexih mafaala xabbacoowiyyah keenih xabbacowta.

76:15.t: Kaadu jannatti urruy ken yakdumc keenit meekisah, mingiilay lakqok tanii kee kobboyyaayiy bililleelak (karaarit kinnuk) tani.

76:16.t: Bililleelay lakqok taniy usun elle faxaanah gidel kiyaasiyyah kiyaaseeni.

76:17.t: Kaadu kay addal galoosay gocoyuk kibuk taniy agleh zanjabiil lek ken yafqen.

76:18.t: Kay addal tan daray, salsabiil deqsittak yaaquben.

76:19.t: Kaadu jannatti urruy elle yanin caalatal elle waara keenit meekita, ken table waqdi luuluy fixiixiseeni ken takka Íe.

76:20.t: Kaadu jannatak faxe ikkeey wagittay, tokkel niqmatay weeloysoonu duude waanaa kee kaxxa Reeda table.

76:21.t: Anxaxin saray xabcin cariirik yanii kee gibdi cariirik yan sari ken xagaral yaniih, qado lakqok tan gabâ biriitat (cagooluk) billiiman, kaadu ken Rabbi yaaqubeenimiy saytuniy taahirik tanik ken yafqe.

76:22.t: Diggah ta galtó sin meqe taamoomih galto kinniih, sin taamoomi addunyal yalli raabiteeh yikcineh yan taamak sugte keenik iyyan.

76:23.t: Diggah Nabiyow Qhuraan oobisiyyah nanu ninnih koi oobisne.

76:24.t: Nabiyow Ku Rabbih meklal isbiraay, korosuk dambit kaxaxah yan marih yab moggolinaay hinnay koroosannuu kee maxqawitit caddok tatreh yan marih yab moggolin.

76:25.t: Kaadu ku Rabbih migaq Carraay, saaku xag.

76:26.t: Kaadu barak tut kaah kummaataay, barak xer waktit salat kaah ab.

76:27.t: Diggah tama mari (koros kinnuk) sissik tiya (addunya kinnuk) kicnoonuuh, qilsi ayroy ellccabol ken qambalta cabaanah (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk).

76:28.t: Nanu ken ginneeh gino keenik karriqqi hayne, kaadu nanu bayisnam fannek, bayissi ken hayneh ken innah yan maray kayrih keenik yayse ciggiilisiyyah ciggiilisenno.

76:29.t: Diggah tama suurá seehadah kassiisi, toysa isi nafsih maqaané faxe num, isi Rabbih gita yabbixe, iimaan kee meqe taamâl.

76:30.t: isin caagiidak hcbeltö caagidiy faxxaana manton, Yalli faxeh akke waytek, diggah Yalli isi ginö caaloota yaaxigi, abba haamal naggaar kinni.

76:31.t: Yalli isi naqoosak isih faxe тага isi Racmat (jannat kinnuk) çulsa, kaadu daalimiinih (koros kinnuk) akeeral qansarissa digaalá massoyse.

77:1.t: Yalli ittâ lakleh itta kataata caacayal xiibite.

77:2.t: Edde luk gibdi caacayay hawwug iyyal xiibite.

77:3.t: Kaadu yalli malaykay qubulta usuk faxa ikke beytay fixiixisiyyah kaa fixiixissal xiibite.

77:4.t: Edde luk yalli malaykay cakkii kee deedalaay, calaalii kee caraamu ittak baxissam kay xaquk luk obtal xiibite.

77:5.t: Edde luk malaykay wacyi Yallih ambiyaa kee farmoytiitil oobissal xiibite.

77:6.t: Seehada Yallal malkit geewaytuh hinnay meesisso keenih yakkuh Yallih digaalák.

77:7.t: Cagalah Qhiyaamâ caagidik isin elle xagnisinteenim akkelem Raqmali.

77:8.t: Tokkel Cutuk duugumaah diifi как gexa waqdi.

77:11.t: Kaadu Yallih farmoytit kee ken ummattâ fanat mekla edde aban wakti muggaqsime waqdi.

77:13.t: Ginô fan edde meklaanaah edde Baxsan ayró, kah xagnisimeenim (woh Qhiyaamah ayró).

77:14.t: Kaadu seehadaytow maca koo tiysixxigeeh Baxsi ayroó kee tet gibdaabini kinnim?

77:15.t: Qhiyaamah ayro dirabboyse marah woo ayro finqi yan.

77:16.t: Naharsi marak Yallih farmoytit dirabboyse mara mafinqisinninoo?

77:17.t: Tohuk lakal wadirsi mara ken kataysenno.

77:19.t: Yallih inkittinaanee dirabboyse marah woo ayro (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) finqi yan.

77:20.t: Seehaday boola Íe leek (daacoyta kinnuk) Sin ma gininninoo?

77:21.t: Edde luk sabhalal leeh dacayri Íe aracay (saynumih maxax kinnuk) bica let kaa ma hanninoo?

77:23.t: tokkel kaa ginnam dudneeh, yayse dudda lem nee.

77:24.t: Ni dudda dirabboysa marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:25.t: Baaxó aracay inkih sin yasgalleeh yabbixe maabinninoo?

77:27.t: Kaadu fayyale qaleelá teetil mahanninoo diggi tct haytuh, kaadu coboy leey salfa lek sin mafqinninoo?

77:28.t: Ni niqmat yangaddee marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:29.t: Korosuk qhiyaamah ayró: jahannam giráh digaaláy dirabboysak sugteení fanah gexa keenik iyyan.

77:30.t: Gexaay iraawita jahannam giráh qiiriy sidiica luddalê fanah.

77:31.t: Usuk Ma silaalisaay, giráh huurik xiqam malik.

77:32.t: Diggah is kaxxa qarih gide yakke xinkilliq qambissa.

77:33.t: Usuk (xinkilliq kinnuk) Dat caawin gaala ceela.

77:34.t: Yallih meesisso dirabboyse marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:35.t: Ta ayró dirableelá yabtaamih dudda mali. (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk).

77:36.t: Yaabaanamih idni keenih mayantacawwima edde yawqoonuh.

77:37.t: Tama ayro dirabboysa marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:38.t: Qhiyaamah ayró korosuk iyyaanah: tah ginô fan edde meklaanaah baxsan ayró, sin kee naharsi mara edde gaabosneh.

77:39.t: Toysa isin malá teelleenik, yi digaalak edde cattimtoonuh yoh malsita.

77:40.t: Ellecaboh ayro dirabboysa marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:41.t: Diggah Yallak meesite mari jannatal silalwaa kee daroorih addal yan.

77:42.t: Kaadu caxá mixuk faxxa haanamih addal yanin.

77:43.t: Keenik iyyaanah: akumaay aquba ruño luk, addunyal abbaasitten mcqc taamah sabbatah.

77:44.t: Diggah nanu tonnal galatna meqem abite mara.(moominiin kinnuk).

77:45.t: Jannatti niqmat dirabboyse marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:46.t: Yalli korosuk iyyah: addunyal meqem akumaay dago wakti teetit hataka diggah isin umeyniitik, Yallat agleyta hayteenimih sabbatah.

77:47.t: Cisab kee galtoh ayro dirabboyse marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:48.t: Kaadu Yallah salat abaay kaah rammita keenik iyyeenik, salat kaah maabaanaay, kaah marammitan.

77:49.t: Yallih aayoota dirabboyse marah woo ayro Finqi yan.

77:50.t: Toysa ta qhuraanay Yallih yab kinnih iyyal aamine weenik, maakitaabaay, maayaabaay kaak wadir elle yaaminoonu waanam.

78:2.t: Itta essertam naba xaagu. (woh qhuraan kee sooloh ayró).

78:3.t: Woh usun itta elle waan xaagu.

78:8.t: Kaadu namma qaynatah sin ma gininnoo? (labim kee sayiimih anuk).

78:9.t: Kaadu sin xin sin xagarih raacat (rofto) maabinninoo?

78:10.t: Kaadu bar sartan ma abinninoo? (kay ditet).

78:11.t: Kaadu laqó quusi edde gurrussan wakti siinih maabinninoo?

78:12.t: Kaadu digga Íe malciin sin amol maxisinninoo? (malcina qaran kinnuk).

78:13.t: Kaadu ayro ifoytay hadiidigay cuumi Íe maabinninoo?

78:15.t: Amboo кее baaxók ubukku ittam teetit nayyaaquh.

78:17.t: Diggah, baxsi ayroy ginô fan edde baxsaana yimixxige wakti yckke. (qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk).

78:18.t: Baanta fuxsinta ayró butta buttah anuk tamaaten. (woh Qhiyaamah ayró).

78:19.t: Kaadu qaran fakkiimaah, afoofi yakke ayró malaykah obtih.

78:20.t: Kaadu qaleelá gexsimtaah edde bakarbakar takke.

78:21.t: Digga luk jahannam girá woo saaku koroosite mara aracal qambalta gira tekke.

78:22.t: Is caddok taturleelah elle gaceyná tekke.( koros kinnuk).

78:23.t: Usun Tet addal amurruqe wayta liggiditte daffeya maráh anuk.

78:24.t: Tet addal xabcaay, aqubbu haanam matammoysan.

78:25.t: Nabam niqni lee kee girâ marih qasaalayi akke waytek.

78:26.t: Tamah keenih taguude galtó kinni. (ken urna taamák gexaak).

78:27.t: Diggah, usun fokkaaqok (cisaabak) meesitak suge weenimih sabbatah.

78:28.t: Kaadu ni aayoota dirabboysiyyah dirabboyseenimih sabbatah.

78:30.t: Toysa Tammoysa! Siinih osisnam mannu digaalák sa keenik iyyan.

78:31.t: Diggah Yallak meesita mari asallam le.(limayeenih).

78:33.t: Kaadu kaqoona ley fooduh tani lon.(inki qumri Íe Ion).

78:34.t: Kaadu galoosay gocoyuk kibuk tani Ion.

78:35.t: Kay addal deedal maxcoo kee dirabboysiyyak tu mayaabban.

78:36.t: Tamah ku Rabbik galtoo kee acway dudda Íe kinni.

78:37.t: Qaranwaa kee baaxooy, ken nammayih fanal enni ittaamih Rabbiy fulte Racmatta le.Kaâ luk yaabaanamih dudda lem matana.

78:38.t: Jibriil kee malayka saffih gacca ittah soita ayro, num keenik mayaaba racmaan kinni Rabbi idini kah yeceeh cakkit yaabá num akke waytek.

78:39.t: Toh nummah ayróy raq sinni, toysa Ellecabô maqaane isi nafsih faxe num isi Rabbí fanah madaara yaallay iimaan kee meqe taamáh abittol.

78:40.t: Diggah nanu xayi digaalál sin meesisneh, seehadayti kay namma gaba tuysukumem yable ayróy, korosti maganey burtá akkinniyoy edde iyyak.

79:1.t: Yalli koros roocitte gibdi siibiyyah siibta malaykal xiibite.

79:2.t: Kaadu moominiin roocitte caalih tayyaaqe malaykal xiibite.

79:3.t: Kaadu yalli giiruh giirissa malaykay Yallih amrih wacyi oobissaah tayyaaqel xiibite.

79:4.t: Kaadu yalli qalaylih qalalta malaykay Yallih amri tagdabuh qalaltal xiibite.

79:5.t: Kaadu Yalli isi amri bicissaah tagdube malaykal xiibite.

79:6.t: Tangayyi (Baaxo kinnuk) tangayyeh tan ayróy gino inkih edde rabta (toh naharsi baantá fuxsunta ayró kinnuk).

79:7.t: Nammey haytô baantá teetil katayta (toh ummaanim edde tanuwweeh edde ugutta baantá).

79:10.t: diggah nee innaa gacsimelem Rabneek lakal nuwwuk addunyâ manoh iyyan?

79:11.t: Rumutte lafoofi tikki inneek lakalaa addunyah gacsinnam?

79:12.t: Is toysa baxaysitteeh, kasaaritte madaara iyyen.

79:13.t: Cagalah is ugut baanatah inki xongoló kinni.

79:14.t: Tokkel usun inkih saahira deqsitta baaxol nuwwuk gaabowan (woh Qhiyaamah ayro kinnuk).

79:15.t: Nabiyow Nabii Muusâ xaagi koi yemeetee?

79:16.t: Kay Rabbi saytunnoowe daqaaray Tuwa deqsital kaah seece waqdi.

79:17.t: Firqawnâ fanah gex, diggah usuk caddok tatrehik kaak axcuk.

79:18.t: Kaadu kaak ixxic: dambik saytunnowtaamih sangel maay litoo?

79:19.t: Kaadu ku Rabbih inkittinaanee kee kay taaqat eddc yanim koh ascassoo kaak meesita num takkemkeh?

79:20.t: Edde luk Nabii Muusa kaxxa astá kaa yuybulle.

79:21.t: Edde luk firqawni kaa dirabboyseeh cineh.

79:22.t: Tohuk lakal iimaanat derre cabeeh sissikuk gexe.

79:24.t: Anu sin Rabbiy inkih daga Raaqa kinniyo iyye.

79:25.t: Edde luk Yalli kaa digaaleh ellecaboh iyye maxcoo kee naharsi maxcol.

79:26.t: Diggah, firqawnaa kee digaalak kaa geyteemil Yallak meesita marah elle kaskassoowaanam edde tan.

79:27.t: Sinaamey ginoh gibduk raqtam siini innaa? hinnak qaranaay?xisoh kaa xisek.

79:28.t: Kay amo fayya heeh kaa massoyseh.

79:29.t: Kaadu kay bar dattoyseeh, kay laqó ayrô diifut yeyyeeqe.

79:30.t: Kaadu baaxó tohih lakal tet fidseh.

79:31.t: Teetik lee kee num kee lac akummu haytam teetik yeyyeeqe.

79:34.t: Tokkel qhiyaamaa kee Kaxxa gibda tamaate waqdi. (woh nammay haytó baanta kinnuk.)

79:35.t: Toh Num abba heem edde kassita ayró.

79:36.t: Kaadu jaciim deqsitta girá yaybulleen saaku yable marah.

79:37.t: Tokkel yallih amrih cinat caddok tatre numuh tugactek.

79:38.t: Kaadu akeerak addunyâ mano muxxuse num.

79:39.t: Toysa diggah Jaciim deqsitta girá is kay orbeyná.

79:40.t: Kaadu I si Rabbih foocih soolok meesiteeh, isi nafsi umaanê fayxik waase numuh tugactek.

79:41.t: Toysa diggah jannat usuk kay orbeyná.

79:42.t: Nabiyow Koros qhiyaamak soltima ma waqdiiy axcuk koo esserta?

79:43.t: Atu tet ixxigak litom mantu tet keenih warissuh.

79:44.t: Tet ixxigá cagalah ku Rabbit taade.

79:45.t: Cagalah atu teetik meesita mara meesiise (kade) kinnito.

79:46.t: Diggah usun tet yablen ayró, addunya manol carraa kee hinnay saakuk sa tu suge wee marih innah gacca iyyan.

80:1.t: Nabii Fooca ribbi heeh derre cabe.

80:3.t: Nabiyow maca koo tiysixxigeeh usuk kok bartah yaniimit dambik saytunnoowa way?

80:4.t: Hinnay kassitaah, woo kassit kaa yanfiqe way?

80:6.t: Tokkel Atu kaat tafkuneeh, kaat agxitta.

80:7.t: Koi tanim matan usuk aaminewaah saytunnoowe waamah.

80:9.t: Usuk Yallak meesitak. (woh inti mali kinnuk).

80:10.t: Tokkel Atu kaak kalih marat agxitta.

80:11.t: Nabiyow atu kah abtenna hinna, diggah is kassiisi.

80:12.t: Tokkel faxa num kaa kasah. (Qhuraan kinnuk).

80:13.t: Yalli yeynebe kitoobah addal yan. (woh Qhuraanay lowcal macfuuzul yani kinni).

80:14.t: Is fayya lc arac leeh saytunnowteh.

80:18.t: Yalli macak kaa ginee naharsi adda?

80:19.t: Tiffoytak (daacoytak) kaa gineeh ranko rankoh kaa caddoddoyseh.

80:20.t: Tohuk lakal gita kaah xabbacoyseh. (woh inâ bagih mawqa kinnik).

80:21.t: Tohuk lakal kaa qidaah edde kaa yaaguqen magaq kaah abé.(woh kabri).

80:22.t: Tohuk lakal Yalli isih faxa waqdi kaa ugsa qhiyaamah ayró.

80:23.t: Tónna hinnay nummah (guddunuh) Yalli kaak abá iyyeemiy kaa kah amrise maabinna.

80:24.t: Tokkel Seehadayti isi maaqô fanah cubbi luk wagitay.

80:25.t: Diggah nanu lee cayxih caxne qamburrek.

80:32.t: Sin kee sin lacah tuxxiq takkê gideh.

80:33.t: Tokkel Qaddik tan xongoloy ayti waysissa tamaate waqdi. (qhiyaamâ xongolo kinnuk).

80:34.t: Too ayró num isi toobokoytak küda.

80:35.t: Kaadu isi inaa kee isi abbak küda.

80:36.t: Kaadu isi barra kee isi xaylok küda.

80:37.t: Woo saaku ummaan num keenik ise duddu haa caagidiy edde agxita le.

80:38.t: Too ayró meqe marih foocitte iftah.

80:40.t: Kaadu woo saaku urna marih foocittel obol yan,

80:42.t: Woo mari usun gibdi korosuuy, gibdi umeyniiti.

81:1.t: Ayró xambaqsintaah diifi teetik kata waqdi.

81:3.t: Kaadu qaleelá baaxô baguk gexsimtaah foyya takke waqdi.

81:4.t: Kaadu tabuni gaali loynamalita waqdi. (idqa gaalá kinnuk).

81:5.t: Kaadu dubaali wariggâ gibdah gaaboysima waqdi.

81:6.t: Kaadu badwa giráh innah ursumta waqdi.

81:7.t: Kaadu nafsitte ise celtaamat xibbansinta waqdi. (woh meqe niara meqe mará luk, uma тага uma mará luk massoysan waqdi).

81:8.t: Kaadu nuwwih yoogoqen awká esserinta waqdi.

81:10.t: Kaadu aben taamá elle tan kitooba xayyoysintaah, fakkimta waqdi.

81:12.t: Kaadu jaciim deqsitta girá ursuntaah, hadiidigsinta waqdi.

81:13.t: Kaadu jannat Yallak meesita mar ah xayyoysima waqdi.

81:14.t: Too waqdi, nafsi maqaanck hinnay umaanek xayoysitem yaaxigeh.

81:15.t: Yalli laqó ifi как qcllita cutuukal xiibite.

81:16.t: Gexxa cutuukay isi aroocat qellittal xiibite.

81:17.t: Kaadu bari dite baaha waqdil xiibite.

81:18.t: Kaadu maaci diifu baaha waqdil xiibite.

81:19.t: Diggah qhuraan massâ kaxxa Íe farmoytih (jibriil kinnuk) maxca.

81:20.t: Usuk (Jibriil kinnuk) caylaleeh fayya le arac le, qarshi le rabbih xaqul.

81:21.t: Wokkel malayka kaa oggoltaah, wacyil amaanat Íe.

81:22.t: Kaadu sin kataysa (Nabii kinnuk) cabuli akke waamal xiibite.

81:23.t: Nummah Nabii jibriil, Yalli kaa edde gine weelot ayro mawqa Íe gambik baxxaqqa Íe ikkel kaa yuble.

81:24.t: Usuk (Nabii kinnuk) wacyi gudduysiyyal cillaaleli hinna. (cinnaane li/gabâ gibda li).

81:25.t: Kaadu ta Qhuraan Yallih Racmatak xiiriyime sheetaanih maxca hinna.

81:27.t: Usuk (Qhuraan kinnuk) gersim hinna, Yallak kassiisih insii kee jinnih oobe kitab akke waytek.

81:28.t: Siinik cakkii kee iimaanal soolam faxah yan numuh kassiisi.

81:29.t: Isin faxxaanam matakka Yallay ginô Rabbih yani faxah akke waytek.

82:3.t: Kaadu badwa sitial tanfuxxukumeeh, sittat tangale waqdi.

82:4.t: Magooqa fokkaqsimtaah addat sugtem iró ciggilsinta waqdi.

82:5.t: Woo waqdi ummaan nafsi yaaxigeh yuysukumem kee udurrusem taamak.

82:6.t: Kce seehadaytow maca koo duquurussaah ku Rabbiy cinda lek?

82:7.t: Kaay koo gineeh, koo massoyseeh soolo koo yeymeeqe.

82:8.t: Isih faxxa hee weelol koo bicsech gine.

82:9.t: Tónna hinnay, a korosey isin nummah gital matanin galtoh ayró dirabbossaana ikkalah.

82:10.t: Diggah, sin dacrissa malayka dacayrih siinit tan.

82:11.t: Yallih gării massakaxxa le kutbe abta malayka sin taama dacrissam.

82:13.t: Diggah meqe mari jannatal yalli keenih yeceeh yan niqmatat yan.

82:14.t: Kaadu diggah umam aba mari (koros kinnuk) Jaciim deqsitta girah addal yan.

82:15.t: Usun galtoh ayró (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) tet cui an.

82:16.t: Kaadu usun teetik cerrita mara hinnon (inkinnah teetik mayawqan).

82:17.t: Kaadu maca koo tiysixxigeeh galtoh ayró kinnim?

82:18.t: Tohuk lakal maca koo tiysixxigeeh, galtoh ayró kinnim?

82:19.t: Woh ayroy nafsi nafsih tu edde xiqe waah, woo saaku amri Yalli Íe.

83:1.t: Keexoo kee midaan daggoysa marah finqaa kee digaala tan.

83:2.t: Usun Sinaamak keexitan waqdi dudsuta тага keexoo kee midaan.

83:3.t: Kaadu usun sinaamah keexeenik hinnay sinaamah miidaanise yakken waqdi daggoysaanah.

83:4.t: Woo mari diggah sinni magooqak ugtoonu waanam Mayasmitaanaa?

83:6.t: Woh sinam ginô Rabbih foocal soltu wayta ayró cisab kee galtoh.

83:7.t: Nummah asmatah! umá marih kitab baaxok gubal sijjiin deqsita aracay ceya lei yan.

83:9.t: Kitaabay yunkuttubey gaba как kaleeni kinni.

83:10.t: Woo ayró finqi yan dirabboysa marah.

83:11.t: Woh galtoh ayró (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) dirabboysa тага.

83:12.t: Kaadu tet dirabbossam matan, ummaan caddok taturliy maggo dambilih yani akke waytek.

83:13.t: Ni Qhuraanih aayoota kaal yakriyen waqdi naharsi marih hayyayoonay tunkuttube iyye.

83:14.t: Tonna hinnay usuk Yallih kitaabâ ikkal, usun abak sugen urna taamoomi (dambi kinnuk) ken sorkocobaxitte buulteh Qhuraan nummaysaanamak.

83:15.t: Wonna hinnay diggah, usun (koros kinnuk) woo ayro (Qhiyaamah ayro kinnuk) sinni Rabbik rebsimaanaah kaa mayablan.

83:16.t: Tohuk lakal diggah, usun jaciim deqsitta girá cula mara kinnon.

83:17.t: Tohuk lakal: tah woo girah digaalay isin dirabboysak sugteeni keenik iyyan.

83:18.t: Nummah digga luk mcqe marih (moominiin kinnuk) kitab jannatak fayya le aracay Qilliyyiin deqsital y an.

83:20.t: Woh kitaabay yunkuttubeeh, gaba как kaleeni kinni.

83:21.t: Yalli xayyoyseh yan malayka kaah sumaaqitta.

83:22.t: Diggah meqe mari jannatal yalli keenih yeceeh yan niqmatat yan.

83:23.t: Sinni Rabbii kee usuk keenih massoyseemi fan Qaraakiy amok wagtan.

83:24.t: Niqmatat yaniinim keenik ken foocitteh wir kee nooril taaxige.

83:25.t: Liyyuk yan gocoyuy alifut yanik Ken yafqen.

83:26.t: Ellecabo kak miski suruylek, woo Niqmatih geytoh qalala mari qalalay.

83:27.t: Kaadu tasniim deqsitta darak tu kaat yasgalleen (daragu kinnuk).

83:28.t: Is (tasniim kinnuk) jannatti daray Yalli xayyoyseh yan mari как yaaqube kinni.

83:29.t: Diggah, isi taama yoysomme mari (koros kinnuk), yeemene maral asaaluk sugen addunyal anqasah.

83:30.t: Kaadu keenil dardaran (xaqxaqan) waqdi, intiitaa kee miniina sittah casak sugen keenit aban anqasah.

83:31.t: Kaadu sinni mará fanah yandabben waqdi, sattaluk andabbuk sugen moominiinit aben xagaa kee anqasah.

83:32.t: Kaadu moominiin yablen waqdi, diggah a mari makkoote mara axcuk sugen.

83:33.t: Kaadu ama koros moominiin dacrisa marah anuk ma rubsuminnon.

83:34.t: Edde luk Qhiyaamah ayro, yeemene mari korosul yasuuleeh, anqasah.

83:35.t: Sinni Rabbii kee usuk keenih massoyseemi fan Qaraakiy amok wagtan jannatal.

83:36.t: Koros addunyal abak sugte umaaneenaa kee dambittel galtimtee? Yeey, dudda Íe galtoh galtimte.

84:2.t: Kaadu isi Rabbih ayti yaceeh, kay amri oggolam cakkik kaal tan.

84:3.t: Kaadu baaxó fidsimtaah, farakka itta waqdi.

84:4.t: Kaadu tet addat tanim qambissaah, foyyah как raqta.

84:5.t: Kaadu isi Rabbih ayti taceeh, kay amri oggoltam cakkik teetil tan.

84:6.t: Kee ta seehadaytow diggah, atu isi Rabbi fanah gexxaah , meqe taama abtek hinnay uma taama abtek, tokkel atu qhiyaamah ayró kaat angoorewettooh abteemil koo gälte le.

84:7.t: Tokkel Le kitab migdak kah yontocowwime numuh tu gactek, (moomintu kinnuk).

84:8.t: Toysa Sahalik tan fokkaaqoh (cisab kinnuk fokkaaqime le sarriinoh.

84:9.t: Kaadu isi mará fanah wallitak yandabbe.(jannatal).

84:10.t: Kaadu Le kitab kay xiiroonih derrek kah yontocowwime numuh tu gactek,(korosta kinnuk).

84:11.t: Toysa Sarriinoh finqaa kee baatih deerise le (seece le).

84:12.t: Urta girâ culele tet niqna tammoysuh.

84:13.t: Diggah usuk addunyal isi marih addal wallitak suge.

84:14.t: Diggah usuk isi Rabbi fanah inkinnah aduure wayu waam yekkele.

84:15.t: Yeey, Yalli kaa gacsele! diggah kay Rabbi kaa yabalih sugeeh kay caalat yaaxigeh.

84:16.t: Yalli korta ayról ciggiila qasa caawil xiibite.

84:17.t: Kaadu bar kee usuk gaaboyseemil (yaskatteemil) xiibite,

84:18.t: Kaadu alsal xiibite, noori teetik duuda waqdi.

84:19.t: Diggah gurraak gurral (caalataak caalatal) koretton sinaamey.

84:20.t: Toysa kah aam i ne waanam maca loonuu? (koros kinnuk).

84:21.t: Kaadu Qhuraan keenil yankirriyime waqdi, Yallah kah kummaate waanaah kah rammite waanam macalon?

84:22.t: Tonna hinnay, koroosite mari rabak lakal ugut yanim dirabboysah.

84:23.t: Yalli yaaxigeh usun sinni sorkocobbaxittet qellissi haanam. (qinaadi kee koroosannuk).

84:24.t: Toysa nabiyow ken aytikumus qansarissa digaalál.

84:25.t: Kinnih immay yeemeneeh meqe taamoomi abbaasite mari, aggiriqqe sinni galto Íe akeeral.

85:2.t: Kaadu Yalli isi naqoosa gaaboysu waamah xagana keenih edde hee ayrol xiibite (woh Qhiyaamah ayró).

85:3.t: Kaadu sumaaqitée kee, elle sumaaqiteynal xiibite.

85:4.t: Moominiin elle digaaluh Baaxó dageeh qanxise mari abbarsimeh.

85:5.t: Bocot urta gibdi girá elle ursan, (yeemene mara edde carrisoonuh).

85:6.t: Usun woo waqdi tet amol daffeyak yenen.

85:7.t: Usun yeemene maral baahaanamal gaabowwu iyyeenih assalaalaquk sugcn.

85:8.t: Ken kah digaaleenim matan, Yallay mayso leeh fayla lel yeemcneenim akke waytek.

85:9.t: Kaay qaranwaa kee baaxô mülki le (kobor le), kaadu Yalli ummaanim yabali kinniih kaak qellittam matan.

85:10.t: Diggah moominiinih tan labhaa kee moominiinih tan sayyó girat carrise mari, tohuk lakat atoobee weenik, usun jahaannam digaalá Ion. Kaadu ken carrissa digaalá Ion.

85:11.t: Diggah, yeemeneeh meqe taamoomi abbaasite mari, jannatittey guba weeqaytitte как gexxa Ion, toh kaxxa maffaafa kinni.(asallama).

85:12.t: Diggah, ku Rabbik xibix kaxxam gibdi digaalah yabbixe waqdi.

85:13.t: Diggah usuk ginó suge way tik qimbisaah, ken bayseek geeral ken gacisah.

85:14.t: Kaadu usuk dambi cabtiliiy, kacanu Ie Rabbi moominiinih.

85:15.t: Qarshi Ie Rabbiy nabna Ie kinni.

85:17.t: Nabiyow isi ambiya dirabbosse Qandeh xaagi koo gufee?

85:18.t: Firqawnaa kee samuud deqsita mara kinni.

85:19.t: Wonna hinnay koroosite mari ku dirabboysiyyat yan.

85:20.t: Yalli keenik derrek marot ken yabbixe.

85:21.t: Koros kaa elle weelossa inna hinnay, usuk Qhuraanay nabna Ie kinni.

85:22.t: Usuk daccarsime luucih addal yan. (lowcal macfuuz kinnuk).

86:1.t: Yalli qaran kee bar mira cutuktal xiibite.

86:2.t: Kaadu maca koo tiysixxigee bar mira cutukti kinnim?

86:3.t: Usuk bolok iyya cutuktay, diifut dite boohaysa kinni.

86:4.t: Hebeltô nafsi mayan malaykatti dacayrih amol kaak yanih akke waytek.

86:5.t: Toysa Seehadayti wagitay cubbusay как ginniimem.

86:6.t: Usuk leey (woh daacoyta kinnuk) sissikuk kaqittak ginniime.

86:7.t: Numtin xiiron kee barrah aliilik fanak tawqc.

86:8.t: Diggah tohuk kaa gine Rabbi kaa gacsaamah duddali kinni. rabeek lakal.

86:9.t: Kassit! Niyaayik lubbittet qellittem fokkaqsimtaah tamballu wayta ayro (woh Qhiyaamah ayró).

86:10.t: Toysa Usuk çayla maliiy, cateyna mali.

86:12.t: Kaadu baaxoy teetik tawqeemit baqittal xiibite.

86:13.t: Diggah Qhuraan yani deedalak baxissa maxcó kinni.

86:15.t: Diggah usun Nabiih uma malah malsan.(koros kinnuk).

86:16.t: Kaadu wohuk gibdi malah anu keenih malsa cakki yambulleemkch.

86:17.t: Tokkel Nabiyow Koros qambaalis, digaalah obtit keenih maqataatakinaay dagoh gide ken qambaalis.

87:1.t: Ku Rabbiy kaxxa fayya leh migaq saytunnos!.

87:3.t: Kaadu Kaay tu isih elle faxxa hee innal caggudusey gino tirri hee tet celtaah teetik faxximtaamah.

87:4.t: Kaadu Kaay anxax qayso baaxok yeyyeeqeh.

87:5.t: Tohuk wadir kafteeh data ruma tet abe.

87:6.t: Nabiyow ama qhuraan koo akriyisennooh, inkinnah kaa mahawwenta.

87:7.t: Yalli faxem akke waytek, diggah usuk tambulleem kee qellittam yaaxigeh.(maxcoo kee taamak).

87:9.t: Tokkel Nabiyow isi mara Kassis! kassis tu-xiqek.

87:10.t: Yallak meesitah yan num kassite lek.(moomintu kinnuk).

87:11.t: Kaadu gibdi umeyni kassitik axxeere-lek.(korosta kinnuk).

87:13.t: Tohuk lakal usuk tet addal marabaay, mayanuwwa.

87:14.t: Nummah isi nafsi dambik say tunnoy se num naggooweh.

87:15.t: Kaadu isi Rabbih migaq cuseeh kaa inkittoyseeh, wonnaluk salaate num.

87:16.t: Wonna hinnay isin addunyâ mano muxxussan akeerak.

87:18.t: Diggah tama sin kassisnem naharsi kitoobal tan.

87:19.t: Toh Nabii Ibraahim kee Nabii Muusal obte kitooba.

88:1.t: Nabiyow Qhiyaamah ayroy Ghaashiya deqsittah xaagi koo gufeh innaa?

88:2.t: Woo ayro Koros foocitte taqunxeeh digaalat.

88:3.t: Is addunyal umaaneenâ taamittaah, akeeral girah addal digaalâ taqabta.

88:5.t: Niqnâ gibdah facta darah leek tet yafqen.

88:6.t: Usun maaqó malón uma caxay dariiq deqsitta akke waytek.

88:8.t: Moominiin foocitte woo ayro saytuniih wir itta.

88:9.t: Addunyal abitte isi meqe taama takcineeh ruffu itta akeeral.

88:11.t: Uma yab kay addal ma taabba.

88:13.t: Fayya iyya qaraakiy kay addal yan.

88:14.t: Kaadu kobboyaayiy maaqabah massoysimteeh daroorï qaxal heeni kay addal tan edde yaaquboonuh.

88:15.t: Kaadu Rooruh tan barkumaami (makaddid) kay addal tan.

88:16.t: Kaadu fidut tan fidooda kay addal tan.

88:17.t: Та koros gaali elle ginniime inna ma wagittaay ma cubbussaa?

88:18.t: Kaadu qaran fayya elle heen inna?

88:19.t: Kaadu qaleela elle dabsimteeh, karersimte inna?

88:21.t: Toysa kassis! Nabiyow atu cagalah kassiisé kinnitok.

88:22.t: Atu iimaanah ken dirkisa num hinnito.

88:23.t: Kinnih immay iimaanat derre cabeeh, koroosite num,

88:24.t: Toysa Yalli kaxxa digaalah kaa digaale Ie.

88:25.t: Diggah ken madaara nee fan akkele rabeeniik lakal.

88:26.t: Tohuk lakal diggah ken cisab (fokkaaqo) kee galtó nel tan.

89:2.t: Kaadu qarafah alsak naharsi tabna barai xiibite.

89:3.t: Kaadu ummaan iimik nammay takkem (xibbaan) kee alluudah taniimil xiibite.

89:4.t: Kaadu bari yamaate waqdii kee bari dardara waqdii xiibite.

89:5.t: Tama hiimiy yalli elle xiibitet kas le numuh kaa xiqtah tan xiiba tanii? yeey, tanih.

89:6.t: Ma tablannaa! Nabiyow ku Rabbi Qaad deqsita marak kah abenna?

89:7.t: Usun Iram deqsittâ kedoy kaxxa caylaay fayya le xisne luk tene.

89:8.t: Is tet celtám Baaxô bagul как ginniime wayte kedó kinni.

89:9.t: Kaadu Nabiyow ku Rabbi Samuud deqsita maray, qaleela ureeh, qarwah haysitek abem ma tablannaa Waad deqsita daqaaral?

89:10.t: Kaadu Firqawnay xiikooluy (kadeeday) sinam edde digaala lek kah abe inna?

89:12.t: Edde luk usun tet addal umaane yeymeggee mara.

89:13.t: Tokkel Ku Rabbi lafit Íe digaala keenil caxeeh, oobise.

89:14.t: Nabiyow diggah, ku Rabbi külli seehadaytih taama dacrisaah ken elle gälte le.

89:15.t: Seehadaytuh tu gactek kay Rabbi kaa yiqiyyireeh (mokkoreeh), kaah yemqeeh kaa hatkise kaa tekkek, yi Rabbi yoh yemqeh iyya.

89:16.t: Kaadu kaa yiqiyyireeh, Isi quusi (rizqhi) kaal ceyse kaa tekkek, yi Rabbi yoo yuyqunxeh iyya.

89:17.t: Tu elle tan im tonna hinna а seehadaytow, isin qayxixxuh matamqaanaay kaa matassakaxxan.

89:18.t: Kaadu tu dagoyti askamiyyah sitta milsissan (ma lallabtan).

89:19.t: Kaadu nagrä maalu cakki maliinoh gibdi makmoh takmen.

89:21.t: Tonna hinnay, baaxó kaxxa angoyyih tangayyeeh, bululsimiyyah bululsimta waqdi,

89:22.t: Kaadu Nabiyow ku Rabbi yamaateeh, malayka massa massah (saffi saffih) gacta,

89:23.t: Kaadu woo ayró (Qhiyaamah ayro kinnuk) jahannam bahsimah, too ayró seehadayti iimaan kee meqe taamay addunyal cinak suge kassitah, woo kassit kee nadaama mannal tu kaah xiqtaa?

89:24.t: Maganey! inni manol maqaané uysukumeh suginniyoy iyya.

89:25.t: Woo saaku Yallih digaalah innah tan digaalah, num ma digaala.

89:26.t: Kaadu Yallih axawih innah yan axawah num ma yaxaa.

89:27.t: Kee satta iyye nafsow. (yallih cusiyyaa kee iimaanat).

89:28.t: Isi Rabbí fanah uduur usuk koh yeceem oggolak akcanuk, usuk ku meqe taama kok oggoleeh, Raabitehik.

89:29.t: Toysa Yi naqoosay meqey moominiinih tanih loowot cul.

89:30.t: Kaadu kecnî luk Yi jannat cui.

90:2.t: Nabiyow atu ta baaxol dabqih yan num kinnito.

90:4.t: Nummah seehadaytu taqabih ginne addunyal rabba iyyam fan.

90:5.t: Usuk (korosta kinnuk) num ise duude waam yakkalee?

90:6.t: Hiddootak: maggo maalu Mucammad qadaawatah bayse iyya.

90:7.t: Usuk num isi ablewaam yakkalee? yalli kaa yablehik.

90:8.t: Namma inti kaah mahanninoo edde yabaluh?

90:9.t: Kaadu arrabaa kee namma sokto (arrobta kinnuk) kaah mahanninoo?

90:10.t: Kaadu namma gita kaah mabaxxaqisinninoo? (umaanee kee maqaanê gita kinnuk).

90:11.t: Toysa Isi maalu meqe gital yaceemit dook (woh akeerâ gibdaabina kinnuk) macah tatre wee?

90:12.t: doô tatur kinnim maca koo tiysixxigeeh?

90:13.t: Woh naqoosannuk moomintoh tan naqso currusaanama.

90:14.t: Hinnay qulul edde gibdih yan ayróh addat maaqo yaskameenimi.

90:16.t: Hinnay tumaliy tussinnah burtat kafe yaskameenimi.

90:17.t: Wohuk lakal yeemeneeh, sabril titta farriimeeh, xuwaawal titta farriime marih num yakkeemi.

90:18.t: Woh migdi maray moominiinih yani kinni.

90:19.t: Kaadu ni aayootal (Qhuraan kinnuk) koroositc mari, usun guri mara .

90:20.t: Usun keenil alfimte girah addat yanin.

91:1.t: Yalli ayróo kee tet wallaqental xiibite.

91:2.t: Kaadu alsâl xiibite, teetil katayta waqdi.

91:3.t: Kaadu laqól xiibite, is dite kalta waqdi.

91:4.t: Kaadu barai xiibite, usuk ditet baaxó buula waqdi.

91:5.t: Kaadu qaran kee qaran xise Rabbi xiibite.

91:6.t: Kaadu baaxóo kee baaxó fidse Rabbil xiibite.

91:7.t: Kaadu nafsii kee nafsi massoyse Rabbil xiibite.

91:8.t: Tokkel umaanê gitaa kee maqaane teetik edde tan gita teetih baxxaqiseh.

91:9.t: Nummah dambik tet saytunnoyse num naggooweh.

91:10.t: Kaadu nummah umaanet tet yubkune num baxaysiteh.

91:11.t: Samuud deqsita mari Yallih farmoyta Nabii Saalic dirabboyseh, usun umaanet caddok tatreenimih sabbatah.

91:12.t: Woo marak umaaneh gibdi num kaqteeh alá yusguude waqdi.

91:13.t: Tokkel Yallih farmoyti Nabii saalic keenik iyyeh: Yallih alá umaaneh maxaginaay, tet arakih ayró teetih caba.

91:14.t: Tokkel kaa dirabboyseeniih, tet yusguudeeniih, ken Rabbi digaalá ken duuduseh alifii keenil hee ken dambih, Woo digaalá keenil massoyseh.(num keenik ma- raaqinna woo digaalák).

91:15.t: Yalli keenil baaheemik ciggiiliyyah kak meesitâ mali.

92:1.t: Yalli barai xiibite, bari ditet baaxó buula waqdi,

92:2.t: Kaadu laqól xiibite, is diifut baaxó ifissi hayta waqdi,

92:3.t: Kaadu labtii kee saytiyá gine Rabbi isil xiibite.

92:4.t: Diggah sin taama sissinih, isin addunyah taamita maraa kee akeerah taamita marah anuk.

92:5.t: Tokkel Yalli acuya iyyem yeceeh, Yallak meesite numuh tu-gactek,

92:6.t: Kaadu maqaaney (jannat kinnuk) yalli meqe marah massoyse nummaysek,

92:8.t: Kaadu cillaaliteeh, Yallak gaddalime numuh tu-gactek,

92:9.t: Kaadu maqaaney (jannat kinnuk) yalli meqe marah massoyse dirabboysek.

92:11.t: Usuk girat rada waqdi, kay maali tu kaah maxiqa.

92:12.t: Diggah tirtó gitay massa Ie baxxaqisnam nel tan.

92:13.t: Kaadu diggah ellecabô dabqii (akeera) kee naharsi dabqii (addunyal) cnni ittam inkih nanu lino.

92:14.t: Toysa, urtah hadiidigta girai sin meesiisa.

92:15.t: Tet cultam matan gibdi umeyna akke waytek.

92:16.t: Usuk Nabii dirabboyseeh, iimaanat derre cabe numu.

92:17.t: Teetik axxersimele Yallak kaxxam meesita num.

92:18.t: Usuk isi maalu yacee numu, ise saytunnoysâ gideh.

92:19.t: Kaadu hebltô numuy kay xaqul elle galtima niqmat ley kaah yemqe mayan.

92:20.t: Kinnih immay, usuk tamah kah abem fayya iyya Rabbih foocih fayxi kinni.

92:21.t: Kaadu usuk sarrah galtot ruffu axceleeh teetit leedele jannat culuwaa saaku.

93:2.t: Kaadu bari diteh mudugi yakke waqdil xiibite.

93:3.t: Nabiyow ku Rabbi koo cabe weeh, koo anqibe weemil.

93:4.t: Kaadu diggah, wadirsitto (akecra) naharsittok (addunyak) koh tayseemil.

93:5.t: Kaadu ku Rabbi sarroh (akeeral) kulli niqmat koh aceeleeh, kaat leedettooh ruffu kaat axcetto.

93:6.t: Nabiyow ku Rabbi qayxixxuh koo geeh, aracay elle orobta koh maabinnaa? abeh.

93:7.t: Kaadu kitab kee iimaan kinnim aaxige waa numuy garcit yanih koo geeh, tirri koo mahannaa?

93:8.t: Kaadu tu malih koo geeh, koo magaddalisinnaa?

93:9.t: Toysa atu toh teexegek, qayxixxu Íe cakkik ma gutqin.

93:10.t: Kaadu kaliaci aba numuh tu gactek, kaa ma xiiriyinay meqe qangara kaal gacis.

93:11.t: Ku Rabbih niqmatah tugactek, kaat walalaay kaa elle faatit!.

94:1.t: Nabiyow Alii koh farakka ma hanninoo islaamaninnoo kee nubuwwannul?

94:4.t: Kaadu fayya koh mahanninoo ku xagar (galab) xago?

94:5.t: Toysa diggah gibdaabinâ luk xabca tan.

94:7.t: Toysa Nabiyow isi caagiidak tamurruqe waqdi, qibaadat taqabaay teetil ingicilliy.

94:8.t: Kaadu Ku Rabbih xaqul taniimih sangeelaay kaa kallacit (jannat kinnuk).

95:1.t: Yalli xiibiteh Tiin kee Zaytuun deqsitta namma caxal.

95:2.t: Kaadu qaley Tuuri siina deqsittal xiibite.

95:3.t: Kaadu a baaxoy saay lei xiibite. (Макка kinnuk)

95:5.t: Wohuk lakal usuk yallih amri oggole weeh, kay farmoytit kataate week girak gubi gubah kaa gacsenno.

95:6.t: Takkay ikkal, yeemeneeh meqe taamoomi abbaasite mari, aggiriqqe wayta galtó le akeeral.

95:7.t: Tokkel tahak wadir seehadaytow galtóh ayróh (Qhiyaamah ayró kinnuk) dirabboysiyyat maca koo bahtaah?

95:8.t: Yalli mekla abba haytaamak meklah yaysi hinnaa? Yeey, kinnih.

96:1.t: Nabiyow ku Rabbiy gino gineh yanih migaaqal ikriy.

96:3.t: Nabiyow! ku Rabbiy kaxxa cinda leh migaaqal ikriy.

96:4.t: Usuk kalamat elle yaktuben gurra barse Rabbi kinni.

96:5.t: Usuk seehadaytu, aaxaguk suge weem barse Rabbi kinni.

96:6.t: Nummah, diggah seehadayti umaanet caddok tatrah.

96:8.t: Diggah madaara ku Rabbí fanah takke Nabiyow.

96:9.t: Nabiyow tableh innaa a numuy waasa? (abu jahal kinnuk).

96:10.t: Yallih naqsi (Nabii Mucammad kinnuk) salat aba waqdi?

96:11.t: Yoh warisey ta salaatak waasâ num, usuk tirtô bagul yene kaa tekkek.

96:12.t: Hinnay Yallak meesil amrisa num yekkek. (wohuk anninnal kaa waasaah).

96:13.t: Nabiyow! Yoh warisey ta sinam waasa num Qhuraan dirabboysech, iimaanat derre cabc kaa tekkek.

96:14.t: Usuk maaxiginnaa? Diggah Yalli usuk abba haam yable Rabbi kinnim?

96:15.t: Caagid usuk (abu jahal kinnuk) elle yakkale inna hinna, usuk tamahak kate wee kaa tekkek gombo kaak gibdi xibixih abbixenno, jahannam girat kaa gasiyak.

96:16.t: Kay gombo, dirabley, hoxa leh tani kinni.

96:17.t: Tokkel usuk kaa qokla marah deerisay.

96:18.t: Nanu girá dacrissa malaykay girai sinam digaaltah seecennok.

96:19.t: Caagid usuk (abu jahal kinnuk) elle yakkalc inna hinna, Nabiyow kay yab moggolinaay, salaatah kummaataay isi Rabbit xayyow.

97:1.t: Diggah Nanu muxxó íe baray leylatul Qhadri deqsitat kaa (Qhuraan kinnuk) oobisne Ramdaanak.

97:2.t: Nabiyow leylatul Qhadri bar kinnim maca koo tiysixxigeeh?

97:3.t: Leylatul Qhadri usuk baray muxxó ley, alfi alsak kayrih aysuk raaqa kinni.

97:4.t: Tama barat malay kaa kee Jibriiliy ruuc deqsita qaraanak edde obta, sirmi Rabbih idnih, ummaan caagidiy Yalli woo liggidih addat mekle luk.

97:5.t: Woo bari saayaay nagaaya, maaci maacissi iyyam fanah.

98:1.t: Kitab elle oobe marak yahuud kee nasaarak koroosite maraa kee Yallat agleyta haa mari, baxxaqqa geyyi haanam fanah edde sugen koroosannuk kata mara makkinnon.

98:2.t: Woh Yallih farmoyta Mucammaday saytun kitooba (Qhuraan kinnuk) yakriye.

98:3.t: Woo kitoobah addal nummâ xaagittee kee qadaalatal tan amrittey massal tani tan.

98:4.t: Mabaxsiminna kitab akah yontocowwime mari (yahuud kee nasaarak), baxxaqqa (Nabii kee Qhuraan kinnuk) keenih temeeteek wadir akke waytek.

98:5.t: Kaadu usun kalah kah amrisimeenim malón yallah qibaada caglisak, kaa yaqbudeeniih baatil diinittek inkih islaam diinî fanah keltaanaah salat soolisaanaah zaka yaceenim akke waytek, woh massa le diini kinni.

98:6.t: Diggah kitab elle oobe marak koroosittem kee Yallat agleyta haa mari, jahannam girah addal у an, teetil waarak, woo mari usun ginok umaaneh gacta ginó kinnon.

98:7.t: Diggah yeemeneeh meqe taamoomi abe marí, woo mari usun ginok tayse ginó kinnon.

98:8.t: Ken galto ken Rabbih xaqul Qhiyaamah ayro qadni deqsitta jannootay guba weeqaytitte как gexxa, umman kay addal waarak. Yalli meqe taamoomi keenik raabiteh, kaadu usun kaak raabiteenih keenih abe konnaba, woh isi Rabbik meesite marih galto.

99:2.t: Kaadu baaxó isi addal taniimiy qilsi tayyaaqe waqdi (rabtem tekkek wohuk kalah tanim tekkek).

99:3.t: Kaadu seehadayti is lem macaay iyya wariggah?

99:4.t: Woo ayró (qhiyaamah ayró) is isi bagul umaanee kee maqaanek abeenimih xaagu inkih warissah.

99:5.t: Diggah ku Rabbi tet amriseemih sabbatah.

99:6.t: Woo ayró sinam soolô ballaaqak taduureh fixiixih anuk, ken taamoomi ken yaybulloonuh ken elle galtoonuh.

99:7.t: Tokkel maqaanek qunxa xuuneyti qilsah gide abe num, wohih galto able íe.

99:8.t: Kaadu umaanek qunxa xuuneyti qilsah gide abe num, wohih galto able íe.

100:1.t: Yalli qaduwwí fanah sissikuk yarde faarisiy fuftoh fuf iyyal xiibite.

100:2.t: Edde luk xukuuqunut ardi gibdah xinkilliq yayyaaqe faarisil xiibite.

100:3.t: Edde luk qaduwwi maaca warara faarisil xiibite usuk garcit (karcit) anuk.

100:4.t: Tokkel is abtah tan ardih gibdah sawar (fulle) fuluk hayta.

100:5.t: Kaadu woo ardat isi macaxu qaduwwi macaxih addal macsissal xiibite.

100:6.t: Diggah, seehadayti isi Rabbih niqmat yangaddi kinni.

100:7.t: Kaadu diggah usuk wohul isi nafsil sumaaqita num kinni.

100:8.t: Kaadu diggah, usuk maaluh gibdi kacanu le num kinni.

100:9.t: Tokkel mayaaxiga innaa! seehadayti kaa qambaltam magooqat enni ittam Yalli yayyaaqu waa waqdi cisab kee galtoh?

100:10.t: Kaadu umaanee kee maqaanek alilwat qellisimak sugtem geytimtu waytam mayaaxiga innaa?

100:11.t: Diggah ken Rabbi ken kee ken taamoomik woo ayro adda yaaxigi kinni.

101:1.t: Al-Qhaariqa: is Qhiyaamah ayroy sinam lubbitte meesissot taagureh migaq kinni.

101:3.t: Maca koo tiysixxigee Nabiyow Al- Qhaariqa kinnim?

101:4.t: Seehadá fíxix kee magga gibdah laahintih (ufuy mali kinnuk) innah edde gacta ayró.

101:5.t: Kaadu qaleelá fakfaken suufíh (woh illi xagooru) innah edde gacta ayró.

101:6.t: Tokkel maqaanê miidaan как yiqilseeh yan numuh tugactek.

101:7.t: Toysa usuk ruño le mano le jannatal.

101:8.t: Kaadu miidaan haliffi akak iyye numuh tu gactek;

101:9.t: Toysa kay orbeyna haawiya deqsitta girá.

101:10.t: Maca koo tiysixxigeeh Nabiyow is kinnim?

101:11.t: Is giray gibdi niqna íe kinni.

102:1.t: Maaluu kee xaylô maggal sittal hiddottaanaah (tirtirissan) Yallih taaqatak sin agxisseh.

102:2.t: Rabi sin elelliiy magooqa guffu haytaanam fan.

102:4.t: Kaadu nummah sarrah aaxigettoniellecaboh ayroh digaala siinil obta waqdi.

102:5.t: Tonna hinnay isin sin qambaltam asmatah aaxiginnitoonuy edde taniinimik waasimak tenen.

102:6.t: Yalli xiibiteh diggah, jaciim deqsitta girá ablettoonumul.

102:7.t: Kaadu diggah asmat íe mablah tet abletton.

102:8.t: Tohuk lakal diggah woo ayró (Qhiyaamah ayro kinnuk) isin addunyal edde agxitak sugten niqmatak esserimetton.

103:3.t: Yeemene maray meqe taamoomi abeeh, cakkil sitta farriimeeh, sabril sitta farriime koh raaquh.

104:1.t: Ummaan camiliy sinam qaybisaah ilqah Finqaa kee baati tan.

104:3.t: Diggah usuk isi maali isi waarisu waam yakkale addunyal.

104:4.t: Caagid usuk eile yakkale inna hinna! Diggah usuk cutama deqsitta giray edde qambisinnaanihim bokookissát gaşyime le.

104:5.t: nabiyow Maca koo tiysixxigeeh cutamá kinnim?

104:6.t: Is Yallih giray ursumteeh hadiidigsinte kinni.

104:7.t: Is leh tan niqnah gibdah xagarak sorkocobbaxittel bukku itta.

104:8.t: Diggah is keenil alfimteh kaluqqu itte.

104:9.t: Usun makaadooday ruubumut tanih addat axawat anuk. (teetik awqe waanâ gidah).

105:1.t: L Nabiyow! Ku Rabbi dakanu leh у an marak kah abenna Matablannaa?

105:2.t: Yalli Ken urna mala fïnqa maabinnaa?

105:3.t: Kaadu haadâ butta buttah keenit ruube itta kataatak

105:4.t: Xeetiy cararte kallak yani keenil qambissa.

105:5.t: tokkel ruma yekke caffaa kee cafulay yonkommeh inna ken abe.

106:1.t: Qhureyshi deqsittah tan kedo luk sugte qaadáa kee edde sugen saay ma qajjibsittaanaa!

106:2.t: Ken qaada gilal yamanâ fanah arhoh aban safar kee cagay shaamâ fanah aban safar kinni meesite kalah.(Yalli kecnih yecee amaan kee niqmata).

106:3.t: Toysa a Qarih Rabbi (kaqbá kinnuk) yaqbudoonay qibaadá kaah caglisak.

106:4.t: Woh Yallay qululuk ken yoskomeeh, conxok amaan (saay) keenih yecee kinni.

107:1.t: Galtoh ayró dirabboysa numih caalat yoh warisey?

107:2.t: Woh qayxixxu Íe cakkik gibdi gutqoh gutqa num kinni.

107:3.t: Kaadu usuk tu dagoyta adoobisaanamah sinam milsiisaay isih maaba.

107:4.t: Salat abah yan maray (munaafiqhiin kinnuk) yallak galto edde garrise waah gibdi digaalá tan.

107:5.t: Usun sinni salat waala maray Íe waktil kaa abewa.

107:6.t: Usun yoobulah sinam sinni tablenkeh meqe taama aba mara kinnon.

107:7.t: Kaadu cine waanam, cina mara gacsah, mingiilaay yakmeenih yaaqubeenim kee wohuk kalah taniimik.

108:1.t: Diggah Nabiyow nanu kawthar deqsita doray jannatti addal yani koh necee.

108:2.t: Tokkel Nabiyow salat kee masgaadá, isi Rabbih caglisak ab.

108:3.t: Nabiyow diggah koo kee atu tirtok luk temeetem niqbi num, usuk samad maliiy kulli kayrik yiggiriqqeh.

109:1.t: Nabiyow koroosite marak ixxic: kee ta koroseey!

109:2.t: Isin taqbuden Numtinwellittee kee sin yallitte maqbuda,

109:3.t: Kaadu isin anu aqbudeh an inki yalla yaqbude mara hinniton.

109:4.t: Kaadu anu isin taqbudeenim ( у allak kalah tanim kinnuk). yaqbude num hinniyo.

109:5.t: Kaadu isin anu aqbudeh an inki yalla yaqbude mara hinniton.

109:6.t: Isin sinni diini Litoonuuh, anu inni diini liyo.

110:1.t: Nabiyow Yallih qokol (cató) kee makki fakim koh Yamaate waqdi.

110:2.t: Kaadu seehadá Yallih diinit butta buttah culah table waqdi,

110:3.t: Toysa Ku-Rabbi saytunnos kaa faylisak, kaadu dambi cabti kaal esser,, diggah usuk isil gaca marak gacim (toobat kinnuk) oggolaah qafu aba Rabbi kinnik.

111:1.t: Abii lahab namma gaba finqiteh, kaadu usuk finqiteh.

111:2.t: Kay maaluy yedderee kee kay xaylo Kaah xiqtem maliiy yallih digaalak tu kaak ma çatta.

111:3.t: Usuk Кахха ura-le giray hadiidigta Culele.

111:4.t: Kaadu kay barray bocó takkuqih tani, girá kaâ luk culele.

111:5.t: Tet fıllat cambok yan akatay is jahannam giráh addal edde diggalsimta yan.

112:1.t: Ixxic nabiyow:usuk Yalla inkittu kinniih, agleyta mali.

112:2.t: Yalli cagalah caagiidaa kee faxaanamih magdabah eleelitan Rabbi kinni

112:4.t: Kaadu makkinnaay masuginnaay mayan, inkittuy kaa ceelaah kaa qeedaala.

113:1.t: Ixxic Nabiyow: maaca gine Rabbi maggansitaah kaa eleelita.

113:3.t: Kaadu gibdi dite leh yan barih umaanek kaa maggansita, usuk (bar kinnuk) culah yan waqdi.

113:4.t: Kaadu kuntuubaabil baabah tuf- tufó abtah tan sayyóh umaanek koo maggansita.

113:5.t: Kaadu kuuxe waynanli kuuxe waynan aba waqdih umaanek koo maggansita.

114:1.t: Ixxic Nabiyow: seehada gine Rabbi maggansita.

114:2.t: Seehadah amoytay ken yamlike maggansita.(Yalla kinnuk).

114:3.t: Seehada kah rammittaah, taqbude Yalla maggansita.

114:4.t: Waswaseynah yan sheytanay, Yallih cusiyyak garcitan waqdi sinam waswasaah, Yalla cusan waqdi qellitah umaanek koo maggansita.

114:5.t: Kaay(sheytan kinnuk)seehadâ sorkocobbaxittet waswasaa kee umaane culsa.

114:6.t: Jinni sheytoonaa kee seehadâ sheytoonak tan waswasak.
